THE FUNCTIONS PERFORMED IN THIS FACILITY ARE BOTH ADMIN AND CLINICAL IN NATURE WHICH REQUIRES SPACE FOR THE MEDICAL PERSONNEL ASSIGNED AT THE BATTALION, SQUADRON, AND REGIMENTAL LEVELS TO WORK AND SPACE FOR MEDICAL FILE STORAGE.

ccns.title: ADMIN STORAGE (MISC)
ccns.description: STORAGE FACILITIES FOR MISCELLANEOUS EQUIPMENT OR GOODS RELATED TO ADMINISTRATIVE FACILITY SUPPORT.

ccns.title: ADMIN FACILITY UNDERGROUND
ccns.description: UNDERGROUND ADMINISTRATIVE FACILITY, UTILIZED WHERE SECURITY PROVIDED BY UNDERGROUND LOCATION IS WARRANTED AND APPROVED BY HIGHER HEADQUARTERS.

ccns.title: UNDERGRND ADMIN STRG(MISC)
ccns.description: UNDERGROUND ADMINISTRATIVE STORAGE FACILITY, UTILIZED WHERE SECURITY PROVIDED BY UNDERGROUND LOCATION IS WARRANTED AND APPROVED BY HIGHER HEADQUARTERS.

ccns.title: FLAGPOLE/BILLBD/ MARKER
ccns.description: NO PLANNING FACTORS ARE AVAILABLE. PROVIDE FACILITIES AS REQUIRED.

ccns.title: SALUTING BATTERY GUN MOUNT
ccns.description: NO PLANNING FACTORS ARE AVAILABLE. PROVIDE FACILITIES AS REQUIRED.

ccns.title: REVIEWING STAND
ccns.description: NO PLANNING FACTORS ARE AVAILABLE. PROVIDE FACILITIES AS REQUIRED.

ccns.title: CLAS MATERIAL INCIN/NO BLD
ccns.description: A FACILITY SIMILAR TO 610 30, THAT IS LOCATED INSIDE ANOTHER BUILDING INSTEAD OF A STAND ALONE STRUCTURE.

ccns.title: WHERRY HSG
ccns.description: WHERRY HOUSING, ALL RANKS

ccns.title: CAPEHT HSG
ccns.description: CAPEHART HOUSING, THRU O6.

ccns.title: CAPEHT HSG,O- 7/O-10
ccns.description: CAPEHART HOUSING, O7-O10.

ccns.title: FAM HSG THRU O6
ccns.description: FAMILY HOUSING THRU O6

ccns.title: FAM HSG O7 - O10
ccns.description: FAMILY HOUSING O7 - O10

ccns.title: LEASED HSG
ccns.description: LEASED HOUSING THRU O6

ccns.title: LEASED HSG,O- 7/O-10
ccns.description: LEASED HOUSING, O7-O10.

ccns.title: RELOCATABLE HSG
ccns.description: RELOCATABLE HOUSING, ALL RANKS.

ccns.title: SURP COMMDTY HSG
ccns.description: SURPLUS COMMODITY HOUSING, ALL RANKS.

ccns.title: FOREIGN SOURCE HSG THRU 06
ccns.description: FOREIGN SOURCE HOUSING THRU O6

ccns.title: FOR'N SOURCE HSG,O-7/O-10
ccns.description: FOREIGN SOURCE HOUSING, O7-O10.

ccns.title: TRAILER SITE,PRVT TRAILERS
ccns.description: THIS GROUP INCLUDES SINGLE AND/OR DOUBLE WIDE MANUFACTURED HOUSING PARKING SITES WITH APPURTENANT UTILITY CONNECTIONS; ROADS; WALKS; STORAGE SHEDS; LAUNDRY AND RECREATIONAL FACILITIES.

ccns.title: DETACHED GARAGES
ccns.description: DETACHED GARAGES ARE BUILDINGS SEPARATED FROM FAMILY QUARTERS, BUT AVAILABLE TO THE OCCUPANTS.

ccns.title: DETACHED CARPORTS
ccns.description: DETACHED CARPORTS ARE ALSO PROVIDED ON THE BASIS OF ONE PER LIVING UNIT AND A SPACE ALLOWANCE OF ONE VEHICLE PER CARPORT.

ccns.title: FAMILY HSG OTHER DET BLDG
ccns.description: THESE CODES ARE FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY AND ARE TO BE USED FOR MINOR DETACHED BUILDINGS DIRECTLY RELATING TO A PARTICULAR FAMILY DWELLING.

ccns.title: FAMILY HSG OTHER DET FAC
ccns.description: THESE CODES ARE FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY AND ARE TO BE USED FOR MINOR DETACHED FACILITIES DIRECTLY RELATING TO A PARTICULAR FAMILY DWELLING.

ccns.title: COMMUNITY CENTER
ccns.description: A FAMILY HOUSING COMMUNITY CENTER (FHCC) PROVIDES SPACE FOR SOCIAL AND RECREATIONAL PROGRAMS AT FAMILY HOUSING PROJECTS WHERE COMPARABLE NAVY OR NON-NAVY FACILITIES ARE NOT REASONABLY ACCESSIBLE.

ccns.title: HOUSING WELCOME CTR (HWC)
ccns.description: A FAMILY HOUSING WELCOME CENTER (HWC) PROVIDES SPACE FOR ADMINISTRATIVE AND SERVICE FUNCTIONS ASSOCIATED WITH THE PROVISIONS OF GOVERNMENT AND PRIVATE SECTOR HOUSING. THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A HWC MUST BE AUTHORIZED BY DIRECTOR, SHORE READINESS DIVISION (OPNAV N46) OR COMMANDANT OF THE MARINE CORPS (LFF-3).

ccns.title: HOUSING,MISC STRG
ccns.description: STORAGE FACILITIES IN SUPPORT OF FAMILY HOUSING.

ccns.title: UNACC ENL HSG
ccns.description: UNACCOMPANIED ENLISTED HOUSING

ccns.title: STUDENT BARRACKS
ccns.description: UNACCOMPANIED QUARTERS FOR 'A' SCHOOL STUDENTS.

ccns.title: RECRUIT BARRACKS
ccns.description: OPEN BAY DESIGN BARRACKS. THESE WILL BE CONSTRUCTED ONLY FOR RECRUITS, RECEIVING BARRACKS, AND USMC SCHOOL OF INFANTRY. RECRUIT QUARTERS ARE OPEN BAY, CENTRAL HEAD FACILITIES WITH NET LIVING AREA SIZED AS ONE EQUAL SHARE OF THE OPEN BAY SLEEPING AREA.

ccns.title: AUSTERE QTRS MISSION ESSN
ccns.description: AUSTERE QUARTERS ARE LODGING FACILITIES LOCATED AT DESIGNATED ENDURING NAVAL INSTALLATIONS. THE CURRENT AUSTERE FACILITY GUIDANCE PROVIDES FOR STANDARDIZED ROOM MODULES WITH CENTRALIZED SHOWER/TOILET FACILITIES FOR ACTIVE DUTY PERSONNEL AND RESERVISTS.

ccns.title: DISCIPLINARY HOUSING
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY IS TO BE USED FOR BERTHING PERSONNEL IN DISCIPLINARY HOLDING OF RESTRICTED STATUS.

ccns.title: UDP HOUSING M.E.(ENLISTED)
ccns.description: UNIT DEPLOYMENT PROGRAM (UDP) PERSONNEL HOUSING FOR MISSION ESSENTIAL (ENLISTED)

ccns.title: GALLEY/MESS BUILT-IN/ATTD
ccns.description: A FACILITY, WITH CAFETERIA STYLE DINING OPERATIONS, FOR UNACCOMPANIED PERSONNEL AND OTHER AUTHORIZED PERSONS THAT IS BUILT INTO OR ATTACHED TO THE UH.

ccns.title: RESIDENTIAL CARE FACILITY
ccns.description: BERTHING FOR RETIRED NAVY PERSONNEL ON A LONG TERM BASIS.

ccns.title: WNDED WRS HSG
ccns.description: A FACILITY DESIGNED TO PROVIDE TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT HOUSING FOR UNACCOMPANIED PERSONNEL IN A WOUNDED WARRIOR/WARRIOR IN TRANSITION STATUS.

ccns.title: GALLEY/MESS HALL
ccns.description: THIS GROUP INCLUDES DINING FACILITIES FOR UNACCOMPANIED PERSONNEL.

ccns.title: AUSTERE GALLEY
ccns.description: AUSTERE GALLIES PROVIDE CORE DINING, FOOD PREPARATION, AND SUPPORT AREAS FOR LOCATIONS DETERMINED AUSTERE BY CNIC. THESE FACILITIES ARE INTENDED TO PROVIDE THE MINIMUM FOOTPRINT AREA AND FINISHES TO SUPPORT GALLEY FUNCTIONS WHILE PROVIDING MINIMAL UP FRONT AND TOTAL OWNERSHIP COSTS IN COMPARISON TO NON-AUSTERE LOCATIONS.

ccns.title: COLD STOR DET GALLEY/MESS
ccns.description: THIS CODE IS FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY IN CASES WHERE COLD STORAGE FACILITIES ARE DETACHED FROM THE GALLEY PROPER.

ccns.title: CONFERENCE CENTER
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY, AND INCLUDES ONLY THOSE CONFERENCE ROOMS LOCATED IN UNACCOMPANIED HOUSING.

ccns.title: LATRINE, DETACHED
ccns.description: LATRINE FACILITIES ARE PLANNED AS PART OF THE UNACCOMPANIED HOUSING. CODES ARE LISTED FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY.

ccns.title: LAUNDRY, DETACHED
ccns.description: LATRINE AND LAUNDRY FACILITIES ARE PLANNED AS PART OF THE UNACCOMPANIED QUARTERS. CODES ARE LISTED FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY.

ccns.title: GARAGE, DETACHED UH
ccns.description: INDIVIDUAL GARAGES WILL NOT BE PLANNED IN CONJUNCTION WITH TROOP HOUSING. THIS CATEGORY CODE SHOULD BE USED FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY.

ccns.title: WASH RACK, DETACHED
ccns.description: WASH RACKS FOR GALLEY GARBAGE CONTAINERS, AND WASH RACKS FOR UNACCOMPANIED RESIDENT'S VEHICLES ARE PLANNED AS PART OF GALLEYS AND UNACCOMPANIED HOUSING. THIS CATEGORY CODE SHOULD BE USED FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY.

ccns.title: TROOP HSG OTHER DET BLDG
ccns.description: THESE CODES ARE FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY AND ARE TO BE USED FOR MINOR DETACHED BUILDINGS DIRECTLY RELATING TO UNACCOMPANIED HOUSING FUNCTIONS.

ccns.title: TROOP HSG OTHER DET FAC
ccns.description: THESE CODES ARE FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY AND ARE TO BE USED FOR MINOR DETACHED FACILITIES DIRECTLY RELATING TO UNACCOMPANIED HOUSING FUNCTIONS.

ccns.title: TROOP HSG STRG(MISC)
ccns.description: STORAGE FACILITIES FOR MISCELLANEOUS EQUIPMENT AN/OR GOODS RELATED TO UNACCOMPANIED HOUSING SUPPORT WILL BE PROVIDED ONLY WHERE IT CAN BE INDIVIDUALLY JUSTIFIED.

ccns.title: UNACCOMPANIED OFF HSG
ccns.description: UNACCOMPANIED OFFICER HOUSING, ALL RANKS

ccns.title: UDP HOUSING M.E. (OFFICER)
ccns.description: HOUSING FOR UNIT DEPLOYED PERSONNEL (UDP) HOUSING - MISSION ESSENTIAL - OFFICER

ccns.title: TROOP HSG EMERGENCY BLDG
ccns.description: THESE MAY BE HUTMENTS (QUONSETS), TENT FRAMES WITH FLOORS AND MAY BE PERMANENT, SEMI-PERMANENT, OR TEMPORARY TYPES OF BUILDINGS. CODES ARE LISTED FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY.

ccns.title: TROOP HSG EMERGENCY FAC
ccns.description: THESE MAY BE HUTMENTS (QUONSETS), TENT FRAMES WITH FLOORS AND MAY BE PERMANENT, SEMI-PERMANENT, OR TEMPORARY TYPES OF FACILITIES. NO CRITERIA FOR THESE FACILITIES ARE CURRENTLY AVAILABLE. CODES ARE LISTED FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY.

ccns.title: FIRE STATION
ccns.description: THIS CRITERIA APPLIES TO FIRE STATIONS WITH STRUCTURAL AND BRUSH FIRE MISSIONS AND IS TO BE USED AS A GUIDELINE FOR PLANNING FIRE STATIONS WITH AIR CRASH RESCUE OPS AND COMBINED STRUCTURAL FIRE AND RESCUE OPS. FIRE STATIONS CONSIST OF AN ALARM COM CENTER, TRAINING FACILITIES, LIVING QUARTERS, RECREATION/DINING FACILITIES, ADMIN OFFICES, AN EQUIPMENT MAINTENANCE AREA, AND AN APPARATUS ROOM.

ccns.title: FIRE HOSE DRYING STRUCTURE
ccns.description: CATEGORY CODE 730 11 AND 12 ARE FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY IN CASES WHERE THESE FACILITIES ARE PROVIDED IN A SEPARATE BUILDING OR STRUCTURE. FOR PLANNING PURPOSES, THEY ARE TO BE CONSIDERED AS PART OF THE FIRE STATION, CODE 730 10.

ccns.title: FIRE CART/HOSE DRYING FAC
ccns.description: CATEGORY CODE 730 11 AND 12 ARE FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY IN CASES WHERE THESE FACILITIES ARE PROVIDED IN A SEPARATE BUILDING OR STRUCTURE. FOR PLANNING PURPOSES, THEY ARE TO BE CONSIDERED AS PART OF THE FIRE STATION, CODE 730 10.

ccns.title: ISSU/RETAIL CLOTHING/UNIFM
ccns.description: THIS IS A RETAIL OUTLET FOR MILITARY CLOTHING AND ACCESSORIES. THIS FACILITY IS OPERATED BY THE NAVY AND MARINE CORPS EXCHANGE SERVICE.

ccns.title: BRIG
ccns.description: THIS CODE IS TO BE USED FOR FACILITIES WHOSE PRIMARY PURPOSE IS THE CONFINEMENT OF PERSONNEL.

ccns.title: SEC BUILDING
ccns.description: A SECURITY BUILDING WHICH HOUSES THE SHORE PATROL AND MILITARY OR CIVILIAN POLICE FORCES MAY VARY IN USE FROM A STANDARD POLICE STATION TO A LARGE SECURITY DEPARTMENT PROVIDING COUNTER-TERRORISM FUNCTIONS AND INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES.

ccns.title: DEFENSIVE FIGHTING POS
ccns.description: AN ELEVATED DEFENSIVE FIGHTING POSITION LOCATED AT ECP'S AND OTHER AREAS NEEDING ADDITIONAL ENTRY SECURITY.

ccns.title: GATE / SENTRY HOUSE
ccns.description: THE GATE/SENTRY HOUSE MAY VARY IN SIZE FROM A SIMPLE SENTRY SHELTER TO A BUILDING HOUSING A GATE GUARD OFFICE, CLERICAL OFFICE, AND WAITING ROOM; OR A TRUCK INSPECTION BUILDING.

ccns.title: BAKERY
ccns.description: THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BAKERIES IS GOVERNED BY PROVISIONS OF DOD INSTRUCTION 4100.33 ? COMMERCIAL OR INDUSTRIAL ACTIVITIES ? OPERATION OF. NORMALLY A BAKERY WILL BE AUTHORIZED WHERE COMMERCIAL SOURCES ARE NOT AVAILABLE.

ccns.title: LOCKER ROOM
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY PROVIDES LOCKER SPACE FOR THE BELONGINGS OF MILITARY PERSONNEL WHO MUST VACATE THEIR QUARTERS FOR EXTENDED PERIODS OF TIME, FOR THOSE WHOSE ALLOTTED STORAGE SPACE IS NOT SUFFICIENT, AND FOR OTHER USES AS DEEMED JUSTIFIED BY THE COMMANDING OFFICER.

ccns.title: LUNCH/LOCKER ROOM
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY IS GENERALLY PROVIDED ONLY TO SUPPORT INDUSTRIAL OPERATIONS WHERE OTHER MESSING FACILITIES ARE NOT AVAILABLE AND REQUIRES SPECIFIC JUSTIFICATION.

ccns.title: LAUNDRY/DRY CLEANING PLT
ccns.description: LAUNDRY AND DRY CLEANING PLANTS. THE ESTABLISHMENT OF THESE FACILITIES IS GOVERNED BY PROVISIONS OF DOD INSTRUCTION 4100.33 - COMMERCIAL OR INDUSTRIAL ACTIVITIES - OPERATION OF. NORMALLY THEY WILL BE AUTHORIZED ONLY IN LOCATIONS WHERE COMMERCIAL FACILITIES ARE NOT AVAILABLE.

ccns.title: DEP SCHOOL - CONSOLIDATED
ccns.description: DEPENDENT SCHOOL GRADES K-12. THE PLANNING AND PROGRAMMING FOR DEPENDENT SCHOOL FACILITIES OVERSEAS IS CURRENTLY UNDER THE COGNIZANCE OF DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE EDUCATION ACTIVITY (DODEA). DEPENDENT SCHOOLS PROVIDE EDUCATION FOR DEPENDENTS OF MILITARY PERSONNEL.

ccns.title: FALLOUT SHELTER
ccns.description: THERE ARE TWO KINDS OF FALLOUT SHELTERS: DUAL-PURPOSE AND SINGLE- PURPOSE. A DUAL-PURPOSE FALLOUT SHELTER HAS A PRIMARY PURPOSE AND SATISFIES SOME OTHER BASIC REQUIREMENT SUCH AS HOUSING, ADMINISTRATIVE, STORAGE, ETC., BUT IS DESIGNATED TO PROVIDE FALLOUT PROTECTION IN EMERGENCIES. A SINGLE-PURPOSE FALLOUT SHELTER IS A BUILDING OR PART OF A BUILDING WHOSE SINGULAR PURPOSE IS FALLOUT PROTECTION.

ccns.title: MISC PERS WEATHER SHELTERS
ccns.description: SHELTERS MAY BE ESTABLISHED AT BUS STOPS OR OTHER LOCATIONS AS REQUIRED. PROVIDE 0.5 SQ.M. (5 SF) PER PERSON.

ccns.title: BUS STATION
ccns.description: A BUS STATION IS A TERMINAL WITH SPACE FOR A WAITING ROOM AND BUS TICKET SALES. IT MAY BE PLANNED AS REQUIRED.

ccns.title: KENNEL - MWR OPERATED
ccns.description: A TEMPORARY BOARDING FACILITY FOR DOGS AND CATS OPERATED BY MWR.

ccns.title: PUBLIC TOILET
ccns.description: USE THIS CODE FOR INVENTORY OF ALL DETACHED COMFORT STATIONS, SUCH AS THOSE AT BALL FIELDS AND PICNIC AREAS, EXCEPT FOR THOSE IN THE UNACCOMPANIED HOUSING AREA. USE CATEGORY CODE 723 20 LATRINE FOR THE UNACCOMPANIED HOUSING AREA.

ccns.title: KENNEL
ccns.description: USE THIS CATEGORY CODE FOR MILITARY WORKING DOG (MWD) KENNELS AND QUARANTINE FACILITIES OPERATED BY THE SECURITY DEPARTMENT.

ccns.title: PERSONNEL SUPPT STRG(MISC)
ccns.description: STORAGE FACILITIES FOR MISCELLANEOUS GOODS RELATED TO PERSONNEL SUPPORT FACILITIES.

ccns.title: DAIRY PLANT
ccns.description: A FACILITY FOR THE RECEIVING AND PROCESSING OF MILK AND MILK PRODUCTS.

ccns.title: RECYCLING CTR
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY SERVES AS A COLLECTION, SORTING, STORAGE, AND SHIPPING CENTER FOR RECYCLABLE MATERIALS AND PRODUCTS.

ccns.title: RELIGIOUS MINISTRY FAC
ccns.description: RELIGIOUS MINISTRY FACILITY (RMF) IS A GENERIC TERM FOR FACILITY ASSETS USED TO SUPPORT COMMAND RELIGIOUS PROGRAMS. RMFS MUST THEREFORE ACCOMMODATE THE RELIGIOUS RIGHTS AND NEEDS OF A MULTI-FAITH, INTER-GENERATIONAL, CULTURALLY DIVERSE MILITARY POPULATION.

ccns.title: POST OFFICE
ccns.description: FACILITY FOR HANDLING AND DISTRIBUTING US MAIL TO AN INSTALLATION, EITHER AS A STANDALONE FACILITY OR PART OF ANOTHER FACILITY UNDER A DIFFERENT CATEGORY CODE.

ccns.title: EXCHANGE RETAIL STORE
ccns.description: THE EXCHANGE RETAIL STORE IS PLANNED AS PART OF AN AUTHORIZED NAVY OR MARINE CORPS EXCHANGE. THE STORE INCLUDES SALES AREA, IMMEDIATE BACK-UP STOCK AREA, STORE OFFICE, TOILETS AND CIRCULATION SPACE.

ccns.title: EXCHGE CENTRL ADMIN
ccns.description: THIS IS SPACE REQUIRED FOR THE GENERAL ADMINISTRATIVE EFFORT OF AN EXCHANGE SUCH AS ACCOUNTING, PAYROLL, PERSONNEL, PURCHASING OR WAREHOUSING.

ccns.title: EXCHANGE / MWR FOOD SVC
ccns.description: THESE FACILITIES INCLUDE: CAFETERIAS, SPECIALTY SHOPS SIMILAR TO DELI, FAST FOOD AND PIZZA, BAKE SHOPS, ICE CREAM SHOPS, ETC. FOOD SERVING FACILITIES OPERATED IN AND FOR THE SOLE CONVENIENCE OF NON-EXCHANGE ACTIVITIES SUCH AS BOWLING ALLEYS, THEATERS, AIR TERMINALS AND SIMILAR, IS ALREADY INCLUDED IN THE BASIC SPACE ALLOWANCE FOR SUCH ACTIVITIES.

ccns.title: EXCHANGE SERVICE OUTLETS
ccns.description: EXCHANGES ARE NAVY EXCHANGE SERVICEC COMMAND (NEXCOM) AUTHORIZED OUTLETS FOR BASIC SERVICES IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE RETAIL STORE, SUCH AS BARBER SHOP, TAILOR/UNIFORM SHOP, RADIO/TV REPAIR SHOP, PORTRAIT STUDIO, WATCH REPAIR SHOP, OPTICAL SHOP, BEAUTY SALON, AND PERSONAL SERVICES.

ccns.title: NEX DEPOT (SERVMART)
ccns.description: NEX DEPOTS ARE SIMILAR TO TRADITIONAL NAVY SERVMARTS, AND OFFER THE SAME TYPE OF INVENTORY, IN A MORE CONVENIENT SETTING. AN NEX DEPOT MAY BE PROVIDED AS DICTATED BY NEXCOM.

ccns.title: RED CROSS/NAVY RELIEF
ccns.description: SPACE PROVIDED WITHIN OTHER FACILITIES FOR THE RED CROSS AND NAVY RELIEF ORGANIZATIONS.

ccns.title: EXCHANGE LAUNDRY DRY CL
ccns.description: DRY CLEANING PLANT AND COIN LAUNDRY FACILITY OPERATED BY THE NAVY EXCHANGE SERVICE COMMAND (NEXCOM).

ccns.title: EXCHANGE MAINTENANCE SHOP
ccns.description: AN EXCHANGE MAINTENANCE SHOP MAY BE PROVIDED FOR THE LOCAL REPAIR OF EXCHANGE EQUIPMENT, FIXTURES REPAIR OF REFRIGERATION EQUIPMENT AND VENDING MACHINES, AND TO PROVIDE SHOP SPACE FOR FACILITY MAINTENANCE CREWS AND PERSONNEL.

ccns.title: BANK
ccns.description: BANKS MAY BE ESTABLISHED ONLY WHEN THEY ARE AUTHORIZED BY THE U.S. TREASURY DEPARTMENT. NORMALLY THERE WILL BE ONLY ONE BANKING FACILITY AT EACH INSTALLATION.

ccns.title: CREDIT UNION
ccns.description: CREDIT UNIONS ARE PRIVATE COOPERATIVE SAVINGS AND LOAN ORGANIZATIONS. FACILITIES FOR A PROPERLY CHARTERED CREDIT UNION MAY BE PROVIDED TO SERVE MILITARY PERSONNEL, THEIR DEPENDENTS, AND OTHER PERSONNEL AS PERMITTED IN THE BYLAWS OF THE CREDIT UNION.

ccns.title: PCS OFFICIAL LODGING
ccns.description: THESE FACILITIES ARE LODGING PROVIDED AT A COST TO PERSONNEL WHO ARE WITHOUT HOUSING DUE TO EXECUTING PERMANENT CHANGE OF STATION (PCS) ORDERS. THESE FACILITIES MAY BE USED BY TEMPORARY DUTY OR LEISURE TRAVELERS. WHERE NEW CONSTRUCTION IS AUTHORIZED, CONSTRUCT MOTEL TYPE FACILITIES WITH BATH AND WITH KITCHENETTES. LIVING UNITS SHALL CONTAIN NO MORE THAN 450 SQUARE FEET OF LIVING AREA. APPROPRIATE CIRCULATION, ADMINISTRATION, MECHANICAL AND SERVICE SPACE WILL BE PROVIDED.

ccns.title: VISITOR RECEPTN (RECRUIT)
ccns.description: A VISITOR¿S RECEPTION CENTER IS LIMITED TO INSTALLATIONS PERFORMING BASIC TRAINING. IT SERVES AS A POINT OF CONTACT BETWEEN TRAINEES AND VISITING RELATIVES OR FRIENDS.

ccns.title: COMMISSRY INC BACKUP STRG
ccns.description: FACILITY USED FOR THE SALE OF PERISHABLE GOODS AND OTHER GROCERIES AND FOODSTUFFS. OPERATED BY THE DEFENSE COMMISSARY AGENCY (DECA).

ccns.title: COMMISSARY COLD STRG,DET
ccns.description: DETACHED FACILITY USED FOR COLD STORAGE OF PERISHABLE ITEMS STOCKED FOR THE COMMISSARY.

ccns.title: FAMILY SERVICES CNTR
ccns.description: THE FAMILY SERVICES CENTER (FSC) FACILITY SUPPORTS THE PROGRAMS THAT PROVIDE THE INFORMATION AND FAMILY SERVICES NECESSARY TO SUPPORT QUALIFIED SINGLE AND MARRIED DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD) PERSONNEL AND THEIR FAMILY MEMBERS IN MEETING THE UNIQUE DEMANDS OF THE MILITARY LIFESTYLE, AS DEFINED BY DOD INSTRUCTION 1342.22, FAMILY CENTERS.

ccns.title: ARMED FORCES RADIO/TV STA
ccns.description: A RADIO AND/OR TV STATION IS NORMALLY ESTABLISHED IN OVERSEAS LOCATIONS TO PROVIDE U.S. INSTALLATION POPULATION WITH ENTERTAINMENT AND NEWS COVERAGE. AS A RULE, THE COVERAGE RADIUS IS LIMITED TO THE INSTALLATION AND IMMEDIATE VICINITY AND THE FACILITIES ARE RESTRICTED FOR TRANSMISSION OF PRERECORDED PROGRAM MATERIAL.

ccns.title: AMUSEMENT CTR / REC MALL
ccns.description: AMUSEMENT CENTERS ARE RECREATIONAL FACILITIES WHICH CATER LARGELY TO THE LEISURE NEEDS OF YOUNGER ACTIVE-DUTY PERSONNEL AND YOUTH FROM MILITARY FAMILIES.

ccns.title: EXCHGE AUTO REPAIR STA
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY PROVIDES SPACE FOR GASOLINE AND OIL SALES, AUTOMOTIVE PARTS AND ACCESSORIES SALES, EMERGENCY SERVICE AND AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR SERVICE.

ccns.title: EXCHANGE CAR WASH
ccns.description: AN EXCHANGE OPERATED CAR WASH MAY BE PROVIDED AS DICTATED BY THE NAVY EXCHANGE SERVICE COMMAND. THE NAVY EXCHANGE NORMALLY OPERATES AUTOMATED, DRIVE-THRU CAR WASHES. FOR MWR (SELF SERVICE) CAR WASHES SEE CCN 740-91.

ccns.title: THRIFT SHOP
ccns.description: THIS IS A NONPROFIT FACILITY FOR THE SALE AND PURCHASE BY MILITARY PERSONNEL OF USED APPAREL, FURNISHINGS AND EQUIPMENT.

ccns.title: HOBBY SHOP - CRAFTECH
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY IS USED FOR THE PURSUIT OF WOODWORKING, PICTURE FRAMING, CERAMICS AND OTHER HOBBY PASTIMES. THIS CCN IS FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY.

ccns.title: MWR OUTDOOR REC CTR
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE APPLIES TO THREE TYPES OF FACILITIES: OUTDOOR ADVENTURE CENTERS (OAC), RENTAL CENTERS (RC), AND OUTDOOR CENTERS & OTHER RENTALS (OCOR). GENERALLY, OAC, RC, AND OCORS ARE FACILITIES THAT RENT AND/OR SELL GOODS THAT ARE ASSOCIATED WITH OUTDOOR ACTIVITIES AND OUTDOOR RECREATION PROGRAMS (ORP).

ccns.title: MWR AUTO SKILLS CTR
ccns.description: THE MISSION OF AUTOMOTIVE SKILLS CENTER IS TO PROVIDE THEIR CUSTOMERS WITH A QUALITY, VALUE- BASED PROGRAM FOR THE MAINTENANCE, REPAIR, MODIFICATION AND IMPROVEMENT OF THEIR OWN VEHICLES INCLUDING CARS, TRUCKS, TRAILERS, MOTORCYCLES, AND BICYCLES.

ccns.title: BOWLING CENTER
ccns.description: BOWLING CENTERS ARE RECREATIONAL FACILITIES WHICH ACCOMMODATE BOWLING AND RELATED FUNCTIONS, WHICH MAY INCLUDE: OPEN BOWLING, LEAGUES, TOURNAMENTS, YOUTH BOWLING, INSTRUCTION, EXHIBITIONS, AND SUPPORT ACTIVITIES SUCH AS EQUIPMENT SALES AND RENTAL, FOOD AND BEVERAGE SERVICE, ELECTRONIC AND TABLE GAMES, AND MEETINGS.

ccns.title: COMMUNITY REC CTR
ccns.description: FORMERLY "FLEET REC CENTER". THESE ARE A CONSOLIDATION OF MULTIPLE CATEGORY B MWR ACTIVITIES INTO ONE FACILITY WHICH ALLOWS FOR REDUCED FOOTPRINT, OVERHEAD, AND STAFFING COSTS WHILE PROVIDING MORE CONVENIENT ACCESS TO A VARIETY OF RECREATIONAL PROGRAMS, SERVICES, AND FACILITIES FOR THE INSTALLATION COMMUNITY.

ccns.title: INDOOR PHYSICAL FIT CTR
ccns.description: PHYSICAL FITNESS FACILITIES PROVIDE FACILITIES AND SUPPORT SERVICES TO MEET THE INDIVIDUAL PHYSICAL FITNESS, COORDINATION, SKILLS DEVELOPMENT, RECREATION AND TRAINING NEEDS OF MILITARY PERSONNEL.

ccns.title: FITNESS ROOM
ccns.description: FITNESS ROOMS ARE STAND ALONE GYMNASIUM FACILITIES, USUALLY CARDIO EQUIPMENT AND WEIGHT MACHINES OR FREE WEIGHTS, IN A SINGLE AREA OF ROOMS WITHIN A FACILITY OF A DIFFERENT CCN. THIS CCN IS PRIMARILY FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES,

ccns.title: ROLLER / ICE SKATING RINK
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY SERVES AS A ROLLER/ICE SKATING RINK REQUIRING A HARD SURFACE FLOOR WITH POTENTIAL FOR MULTIPURPOSE USE.

ccns.title: INFO, TKT TRAVEL OFFICE
ccns.description: THE MISSION OF THE RECREATION INFORMATION, TICKETS AND TRAVEL (ITT) OFFICE IS TO SERVE THE MILITARY COMMUNITY'S LEISURE NEEDS BY PROVIDING INFORMATION ON WHAT TO SEE AND DO LOCALLY, OFFERING TOURS TO NEARBY ATTRACTIONS, SELLING TICKETS FOR MUSICAL AND THEATRICAL PERFORMANCES, AND OTHER SPECIAL EVENTS, AND PROVIDING OPTIONS FOR LEISURE TRAVEL (THIS MAY INCLUDE CRUISE AND AIRLINE TICKET SERVICE).

ccns.title: AUSTERE FITNESS CENTER
ccns.description: AUSTERE PHYSICAL FITNESS FACILITIES PROVIDE FACILITIES AND SUPPORT SERVICES TO MEET THE INDIVIDUAL PHYSICAL FITNESS, COORDINATION, SKILLS DEVELOPMENT, RECREATIONAL AND TRAINING NEEDS OF MILITARY PERSONNEL STATIONED IN DESIGNATED AUSTERE OPERATING ENVIRONMENTS.

ccns.title: GUN/SKEET/TRAP BLDG
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY IS FOR SUPPORT OF THE RESPECTIVE RANGES AND CONTAINS OPERATOR'S OFFICE, STORAGE, SALES AREA, GUN MAINTENANCE SHOP, TOILETS AND LOUNGE.

ccns.title: SWIMMING POOL - INDOOR
ccns.description: THE PRIMARY PURPOSE OF SWIMMING POOLS IS TO SUPPORT PHYSICAL READINESS PROGRAMS AS WELL AS INSTRUCTIONAL, INFORMAL AND INTRAMURAL ACTIVITIES, AND TO SERVE THE RECREATIONAL NEEDS OF ACTIVE-DUTY MILITARY PERSONNEL AND THEIR SPOUSES AND CHILDREN, RETIREES AND DOD AUTHORIZED CIVILIANS.

ccns.title: MWR MIL REC CENTER
ccns.description: THE MWR MILITARY RECREATION CENTER (MRC) HAS INCORPORATED THE FEATURES AND FUNCTIONS OF THE FLEET RECREATION CENTER IN ORDER TO DEFINE A FACILITY THAT SERVES THE RECREATIONAL NEEDS OF BOTH SHIP-BASED ENLISTED PERSONNEL AS WELL AS THOSE LIVING IN BACHELOR ENLISTED QUARTERS. THEY CONSIST OF SERVICES, FACILITIES, AND PROGRAMS INTENDED TO PROVIDE ALCOHOL-FREE AND TOBACCO-FREE RECREATIONAL ALTERNATIVES FOR 17- TO 25-YEAR OLDS. ALSO KNOWN AS LIBERTY OR SINGLE SAILOR CENTERS.

ccns.title: YOUTH & SAC (6- 18 YRS)
ccns.description: THE YOUTH CENTER IS A SOCIAL AND RECREATIONAL CENTER PRIMARILY FOR USE BY CHILDREN AGES 6 TO 18 IN SUPPORT OF A YOUTH PROGRAM. THE YOUTH CENTER SUPPORTS OPPORTUNITIES FOR YOUTH TO DEVELOP THEIR PHYSICAL, SOCIAL, EMOTIONAL, AND COGNITIVE ABILITIES AND TO EXPERIENCE ACHIEVEMENT, LEADERSHIP, ENJOYMENT, FRIENDSHIP, AND RECOGNITION.

ccns.title: THEATER
ccns.description: THIS CATCODE IS FOR A FACILITY FOR THE SHOWING OF MOVIES AND THE PRESENTATION OF STAGE PRODUCTIONS.

ccns.title: ALL HANDS CLUB
ccns.description: THIS CODE IS USED TO PLAN THE SPACE REQUIREMENTS FOR A SINGLE FACILITY TO ACCOMMODATE ON-BASE FACILITIES, SURROUNDING COMPETITIVE ENVIRONMENT AND SIZE OF THE SUPPORTING POPULATION. IT MAY INCLUDE ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING COMPONENTS: TABLE SERVICE RESTAURANT, QUICK SERVICE RESTAURANT, BANQUET/CATERING ROOM, CAFETERIA, GAMING ROOM (OCONUS, NON-US), BEVERAGE LOUNGE WITH OR WITHOUT ENTERTAINMENT.

ccns.title: MWR CATERING FACILITY
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY MAY BE STAND ALONE OR COMBINED WITH AN OFFICERS CLUB, ENLISTED CLUB, ALL HANDS CLUB, BOWLING CENTER, MARINA CLUBHOUSE, OR GOLF CLUBHOUSE. THE CATERING FACILITY OFTEN INCLUDES BINGO OPERATIONS IN AT LEAST ONE ROOM.

ccns.title: NEX PACKAGE STORE
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY PROVIDES FOR RETAIL SALES TO AUTHORIZED CUSTOMERS AND THE TRANSFER (WHOLESALE) OF ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES TO CLUBS AND OPEN MESSES. A SELECT FEW LOCATIONS HAVE PACKAGE STORES OPERATED BY MWR AS PERMITTED BY CONGRESS.

ccns.title: CHILD DEVELOPMT CENTER
ccns.description: CHILD DEVELOPMENT CENTERS PROVIDE CHILD CARE/DEVELOPMENT FOR CHILDREN AGES 6-WEEKS TO 6 YEARS OLD FOR FULL-DAY, PART-DAY, AND HOURLY CARE.

ccns.title: NAVY FLYING CLUB FACILITY
ccns.description: THE NAVY FLYING CLUB IS A RECREATIONAL FLYING ACTIVITY LOCATED ON OR NEAR MILITARY INSTALLATIONS USED BY AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL AND APPROVED BY THE DEPARTMENT CONCERNED.

ccns.title: LIBRARY
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY IS FOR RECREATIONAL READING AND STUDY.

ccns.title: MWR READY STOR
ccns.description: STORAGE FACILITIES FOR MISCELLANEOUS EQUIPMENT AND/OR GOODS RELATED TO COMMUNITY SUPPORT WILL BE PROVIDED ONLY WHERE THEY CAN BE INDIVIDUALLY JUSTIFIED. THERE ARE NO CRITERIA FOR THIS TYPE OF FACILITY.

ccns.title: RECREATION PAVILION
ccns.description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS FACILITY IS TO SUPPORT RECREATION AREAS SUCH AS PARKS, PLAYGROUNDS, PICNIC AREAS, BEACHES, ETC. THIS FACILITY MAY INCLUDE LOUNGE, TOILETS, BATHHOUSES, STORAGE AREAS, SNACK BARS, AND/OR CONCESSION STAND FOR LIMITED AND RELATED ITEMS AS REQUIRED.

ccns.title: RIDING STABLES
ccns.description: PROVIDES SPACE FOR SINGLE STALLS, BOX OR DOUBLE STALLS, TREATMENT STALLS, QUARANTINE AREAS, QUARTERS FOR ONE OPERATOR, HAY STORAGE AREA, GRAIN ROOM, TACK LOCKERS, SWEAT PAD AND BLANKET DRYING AREA, OFFICE, AND TOILETS.

ccns.title: GOLF CLUBHOUSE
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY ACTS AS THE MAIN SERVICE AREA FOR THE GOLF COURSE. FOODSERVICE AND GOLF EQUIPMENT SALES ARE THE TWO PRIMARY FUNCTIONS OF THE CLUBHOUSE.

ccns.title: MWR RENTAL ACCOMMODATIONS
ccns.description: MWR RENTAL ACCOMMODATIONS ARE PERMANENT, STAND-ALONE, OR MULTIPLEX BUILDINGS. THEY MAY TAKE THE FORM OF MODERN MOTELS, MULTI- LEVEL HOTELS, PRIMITIVE CAMPING CABINS WITH NO UTILITY CONNECTIONS, OR ALMOST ANYTHING IN BETWEEN, DEPENDING ON THE GEOGRAPHY, THE MARKET BEING SERVED, AND DEMAND.

ccns.title: GOLF STOR MAINT FAC
ccns.description: A GOLF STORAGE/MAINTENANCE FACILITY PROVIDES SPACE FOR MAINTENANCE,STORAGE, AND SUPPORTING SPACES ASSOCIATED WITH INSTALLATION GOLF COURSES OF NINE OR MORE HOLES.

ccns.title: EXCHGE DIST CTR (WRHSE)
ccns.description: THIS TYPE WAREHOUSE MAY BE PROVIDED FOR BULK BACK-UP STORAGE (EXCHANGE STOCK AND OPERATING SUPPLIES) TO SUPPORT ALL EXCHANGE OPERATIONS WITHIN A GEOGRAPHICAL AREA AS DETERMINED BY NEXCOM OR MARINE CORPS EXCHANGE SERVICES.

ccns.title: EXCHANGE INSTALLATION WHSE
ccns.description: THIS CATCODE IS FOR THE TOTAL STORAGE SPACE THAT MAY BE PROVIDED IN INSTALLATION EXCHANGE WAREHOUSES TO ACCOMMODATE BACK-UP STORAGE FOR EXCHANGE RETAIL ACTIVITIES FOR THAT INSTALLATION.

ccns.title: MARINA SUPPT BLDG
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY PROVIDES SPACE FOR OFFICE, EQUIPMENT CHECK-OUT, REPAIR, AND STORAGE. IT DOES NOT INCLUDE DOCKS, MARINA SLIPS, AND WALKWAYS WHICH ARE LISTED UNDER CODE 750 60. THIS IS A SPECIAL FACILITY WHICH IS REQUIRED ONLY AT OUTDOOR RECREATION AREAS WHICH HAVE WATERFRONT FACILITIES AVAILABLE FOR BOATING ACTIVITIES.

ccns.title: EDUCATIONAL SRVCS OFFICE
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY IS INTENDED TO PROVIDE FACILITIES FOR THE ADVANCEMENT OF THE ACADEMIC, TECHNICAL, AND VOCATIONAL EDUCATION OF MILITARY PERSONNEL OF ALL GRADES AND RANKS IN ORDER TO ENHANCE THEIR POTENTIAL TO THE SERVICE.

ccns.title: BATHHOUSE
ccns.description: THE PRIMARY PURPOSE OF A BATHHOUSE IS TO PROVIDE A FACILITY FOR POOL AND BEACH USERS TO STORE THEIR BELONGINGS WHILE USING THE RECREATIONAL FACILITY, TO CLEAN UP, AND HAVE A PLACE TO USE THE RESTROOM. IN ADDITION, THE BATHHOUSE CONTAINS THE OFFICES FOR THE ADMINISTRATIVE STAFF AND LIFEGUARDS.

ccns.title: MWR EQUIP MAINT SHOP
ccns.description: AN MWR EQUIPMENT MAINTENANCE SHOP IS WHERE NAF VEHICLES AND GROUNDS MAINTENANCE EQUIPMENT (NON-GOLF), IS MAINTAINED.

ccns.title: MWR CAR WASH
ccns.description: A COIN OPERATED STAND ALONE CAR WASH AND VACUUM ISLAND OPERATED BY MWR.

ccns.title: MWR RV SUPPORT BLDG
ccns.description: RECREATIONAL RV PARKS PROVIDE THE MILITARY COMMUNITY WITH OUTDOOR RECREATION OPPORTUNITIES AT LOCATIONS WITH ATTRACTIVE NATURAL RESOURCES. TO COMPLEMENT THE CAMPING EXPERIENCE, AND DEPENDING ON LOCATION, RECREATIONAL RV PARKS MAY OFFER ACTIVITIES SUCH AS BOATING, CANOEING, FISHING, HIKING, HUNTING, SKIING AND SWIMMING.

ccns.title: SMOKING GAZEBO
ccns.description: SMOKING GAZEBO¿S ARE PROVIDED AS DESIGNATED SMOKING AREAS OUTSIDE OF NAVY AND MARINE CORPS FACILITIES. SIZE IS STANDARD. THIS CCN IS FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES.

ccns.title: TDY OFFICIAL LODGING
ccns.description: THESE FACILITIES PROVIDE TEMPORARY LIVING ACCOMMODATIONS THAT INCLUDES IN-ROOM HOUSEKEEPING SERVICES AND AMENITIES SIMILAR TO A MID-GRADE HOTEL. SERVICE CHARGES ARE ASSESSED TO TDY TRAVELERS TO MANAGE OPERATIONAL AND RECAPITALIZATION REQUIREMENTS. TDY OFFICIAL LODGING MAY BE USED BY PERMANENT CHANGE OF STATION AND LEISURE TRAVELERS

ccns.title: LIM SVC OFFICIAL LODGING
ccns.description: LIMITED SERVICE LODGING PROVIDES TRANSIENT FACILITIES FOR ACTIVE DUTY AND RESERVE MEMBERS (REGARDLESS OF RANK) OF DEPLOYED UNITS AT AN INSTALLATION OTHER THAN THE UNITS' HOMEPORT. THESE FACILITIES PROVIDE LIMITED IN-ROOM HOUSEKEEPING SERVICES AND AMENITIES COMMENSURATE WITH THE UNIT'S LENGTH OF STAY.

ccns.title: FISHER HOUSE
ccns.description: DON FISHER HOUSES PROVIDE TEMPORARY, CONVENIENT, AND AFFORDABLE LODGING TO NAVY MEDICAL TREATMENT FACILITY (MTF) PATIENTS (¿WOUNDED WARRIORS¿), MEMBERS OF THE FAMILIES OF SUCH PATIENTS, AND OTHERS PROVIDING THE EQUIVALENT OF FAMILIAL SUPPORT FOR SUCH PATIENTS.

ccns.title: NGIS-OPERATED CONF CTR
ccns.description: CONFERENCE CENTERS OPERATED BY NAVY GATEWAY INNS AND SUITES

ccns.title: OUTDOOR PLAYING COURTS
ccns.description: OUTDOOR PLAYING COURTS PROVIDE FACILITIES AND SUPPORT SERVICES TO MEET THE INDIVIDUAL PHYSICAL FITNESS AND RECREATION NEEDS OF MILITARY PERSONNEL. THE FACILITIES MAY ALSO SERVE DEPENDENTS, RETIREES AND AUTHORIZED CIVILIANS.

ccns.title: PLAYING FIELDS
ccns.description: PLAYING FIELDS PROVIDE FACILITIES AND SUPPORT SERVICES TO MEET THE INDIVIDUAL PHYSICAL FITNESS, COORDINATION, SKILLS DEVELOPMENT, TRAINING AND RECREATION NEEDS OF MILITARY PERSONNEL. THE FACILITIES MAY ALSO SERVE DEPENDENTS, RETIREES AND AUTHORIZED CIVILIANS. ACTIVITIES WHICH MAY BE ACCOMMODATED IN PLAYING FIELDS INCLUDE: BASEBALL, FOOTBALL, SOCCER, SOFTBALL, TRACK AND FIELD, ETC.

ccns.title: BATTING CAGE
ccns.description: A SMALL ENCLOSED AREA WITH A PITCHING MACHINE OR OTHER PROVISION FOR PITCHING TO A BATTER TO ALLOW BATTING PRACTICE.

ccns.title: JOGGING TRACK
ccns.description: JOGGING TRACKS MAY BE PAVED OR A NATURAL SURFACE AND ARE PROVIDED FOR THE INDIVIDUAL PHYSICAL FITNESS AND RECREATION OF MILITARY PERSONNEL. JOGGING TRACKS ARE PROVIDED AND SIZED AS REQUIRED.

ccns.title: GO-CART TRACK
ccns.description: SMALL OVAL OR OTHER SHAPED PAVED TRACKS WHERE PARTICIPANTS RACE GASOLINE POWERED GO-CARTS.

ccns.title: OUTDOOR SWIM POOL
ccns.description: OUTDOOR POOLS MAY INCLUDE WATER PARK FEATURES AND SPRAY PARKS.

ccns.title: DETACHED POOL FACILITY
ccns.description: THIS CATCODE IS USED IN THOSE CASES WHERE SUCH FACILITIES ARE LOCATED IN A BUILDING SEPARATE FROM THE MAIN POOL HOUSE.

ccns.title: WADING POOL / SPLASH PL
ccns.description: WADING POOLS ARE SMALL SHALLOW POOLS GENERALLY FOR TODDLERS AND SMALL CHILDREN. THESE ARE NORMALLY PLANNED AS ADJUNCTS TO MAIN POOLS (SEE CC 740 53 SWIMMING POOL¿INDOOR). THIS CODE IS FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES AND ONLY IN THOSE CASES WHERE WADING POOLS ARE DETACHED FROM THE MAIN FACILITY.

ccns.title: TV COMM LINES
ccns.description: CATEGORY CODES 750 35 AND 750 36 ARE FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY. SUCH FACILITIES ARE PROVIDED ONLY AT REMOTE INSTALLATIONS WHERE CENTRAL TV RECEPTION AND LOCAL DISTRIBUTION SYSTEMS CAN BE INDIVIDUALLY JUSTIFIED.

ccns.title: OUTDR ADVENTR AREA
ccns.description: INCLUDES ROPES COURSES, NATURAL RECREATION FEATURES (ROCK CLIMBING, HIKING TRAILS, MOUNTAIN BIKE TRAILS, PAINTBALL RANGES, MOTOCROSS/BMX AREAS).

ccns.title: OUTDR MWR EQUIP RNTL STO
ccns.description: OUTDOOR FENCED AREA WITH LIGHTING FOR STORAGE OF MWR RENTAL EQUIPMENT (NOT ENCLOSED). FACILITY SHOULD BE CO-LOCATED WITH THE OUTDOOR RECREATION CENTER CCN 740- 37, IF THERE IS ONE.

ccns.title: MWR VEH/ RV/ BOAT STO CPD
ccns.description: THIS CATCODE IS FOR FENCED IN AREA FOR THE STORAGE OF PERSONAL WATER CRAFT, BOATS, TRAILERS, CAMPERS, MOTOR HOMES, ETC. AND OPERATED BY MWR.

ccns.title: GOLF COURSE
ccns.description: GOLF COURSES ARE RECREATIONAL FACILITIES WHICH MAY ACCOMMODATE: RECREATIONAL GOLFING, PRACTICE, INSTRUCTION, TOURNAMENTS, EXHIBITIONS, SPECIAL EVENTS, AND WINTER RECREATIONAL ACTIVITIES SUCH AS CROSS-COUNTRY SKIING, ICE SKATING, SLEDDING AND TOBOGGANING.

ccns.title: OUTDOOR THEATER
ccns.description: AN OUTDOOR THEATER MAY EITHER BE DRIVE OR WALK IN, AND IS USED PREDOMINANTLY TO SHOW FILMS.

ccns.title: SKEET AND/OR TRAP RANGE
ccns.description: A SHOOTING RANGE TO ENGAGE IS THE SPORTS OF SKEET AND TRAP SHOOTING. A BUILDING MAY BE INCLUDED IF THE FACILITY CAN BE SELF SUSTAINING.

ccns.title: BAND STAND
ccns.description: A RAISED PLATFORM USED BY BANDS OR FOR OTHER PUBLIC ENTERTAINMENT ACTIVITIES.

ccns.title: GOLF DRIVING RANGE
ccns.description: USUALLY ASSOCIATED WITH A GOLF COURSE, THIS FACILITY ALLOWS THE GOLFER TO PRACTICE HITTING GOLF BALLS.

ccns.title: MWR REC GRNDS
ccns.description: THIS FACILITY INCLUDES PARKS, PLAYGROUNDS, OR PICNIC AREAS AND RECREATION PAVILIONS (CODE 740 78). OPERATED BY MWR.

ccns.title: REC CAMPGRND TENT
ccns.description: PLEASE SEE CCN 750-59 FOR GENERAL DESCRIPTION OF CAMPGROUND. THIS CCN WILL BE USED FOR TENT CAMPING, NO VEHICLE PADS ARE REQUIRED.

ccns.title: REC CAMPGROUND - RV
ccns.description: RECREATIONAL CAMPGROUNDS PROVIDE THE MILITARY COMMUNITY WITH OUTDOOR RECREATION OPPORTUNITIES AT LOCATIONS WITH ATTRACTIVE NATURAL RESOURCES. TO COMPLEMENT THE CAMPING EXPERIENCE, AND DEPENDING ON LOCATION, RECREATIONAL CAMPGROUNDS MAY OFFER ACTIVITIES SUCH AS BOATING, CANOEING, FISHING, HIKING, HUNTING, SKIING AND SWIMMING.

ccns.title: MARINA/BOAT RAMP
ccns.description: THIS CATCODE IS FOR A WATERFRONT FACILITY PROVIDING RENTAL BOATS, A BOAT LAUNCH, AND OTHER WATERFRONT AMENITIES. OPERATED BY MWR.

ccns.title: RECREATIONAL PIER
ccns.description: THIS CCN IS USED FOR STAND-ALONE RECREATIONAL PIER FACILITIES (E.G. FISHING PIERS) WHERE THERE IS NO EXISTING MARINA.

ccns.title: PLAYGROUNDS
ccns.description: PLAYGROUNDS ARE OUTDOOR ACTIVITY AREAS PROVIDED FOR CHILDREN AND ARE AN INTEGRAL PART OF THE FUNCTIONS ASSOCIATED WITH SCHOOLS, FAMILY HOUSING AREAS, OUTDOOR ATHLETIC AND RECREATIONAL AREAS, AND CHILD DEVELOPMENT, SCHOOL AGE CARE AND YOUTH CENTERS.

ccns.title: ATHLETIC STADIUM
ccns.description: A SPORTS ARENA USED FOR ATHLETIC ACTIVITIES AND INCLUDES AN ATHLETIC FIELD AND PERMANENTLY CONSTRUCTUED FEATURES THAT CAN INCLUDE SPECTATOR SEATING, GRANDSTANDS, PRESS BOXES/ANNOUNCER BOOTHS, CONCESSIONS STANDS AND SUPPORTING FEATURES BASED ON THE ACTIVITY TYPE. LIGHTING AND FENCING ARE CAPTURED UNDER OTHER CCNS.

ccns.title: MUSEUMS / MEMORIAL BLDG
ccns.description: NO SPECIFIC PLANNING FACTORS ARE AVAILABLE FOR THIS GROUP. REQUIREMENTS FOR EACH OF THE ABOVE FACILITIES WILL BE ESTABLISHED BASED ON INDIVIDUAL STUDIES AND SUPPORTING JUSTIFICATION. MUSEUMS MUST BE APPROVED BY SECNAV.

ccns.title: OUTDOOR MONUMENT/MEMORIA L
ccns.description: THIS CATCODE IS FOR STATUES, MONUMENTS, PLAQUES ETC. COMMEMORATING SPECIAL EVENTS, LOCATIONS OR PEOPLE. THE OFFICE OF THE COMPTROLLER OF THE NAVY HAS RULED THAT THE USE OF APPROPRIATED FUNDS (INCLUDING OM&N FUNDS) FOR THE CONSTRUCTION AND MAINTENANCE OF MEMORIALS IS RESTRICTED TO THOSE MEMORIALS SPECIFICALLY APPROVED BY CONGRESSIONAL AUTHORITY.

ccns.title: CEMETERY
ccns.description: NO SPECIFIC PLANNING FACTORS ARE AVAILABLE FOR THIS GROUP. REQUIREMENTS FOR EACH OF THE ABOVE FACILITIES WILL BE ESTABLISHED BASED ON INDIVIDUAL STUDIES AND SUPPORTING JUSTIFICATION. SECNAV APPROVAL WILL BE REQUIRED.

ccns.title: ELECTRIC POWER PLANT BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH AN ELECTRIC POWER PLANT INCLUDING CATEGORY CODES 811 10, 811 25, 811 45, 811 46, AND 81150.

ccns.title: ELECTRIC PWR PLNT - DIESL
ccns.description: A CENTRAL PLANT FOR THE PRODUCTION OF ELECTRICITY USING DIESEL GENERATORS.

ccns.title: ELECTRIC POWER PLANT-STEAM
ccns.description: A CENTRAL PLANT FOR THE PRODUCTION OF ELECTRICITY USING STEAM TURBINE GENERATORS.

ccns.title: ELECTRIC POWER PLT-GAS TUR
ccns.description: A CENTRAL PLANT FOR THE PRODUCTION OF ELECTRICITY USING GAS FIRED TURBINE GENERATORS.

ccns.title: WIND TURBINE
ccns.description: A SOURCE FOR THE PRODUCTION OF ELECTRICITY USING WIND TURBINES.

ccns.title: ELEC POWER PHOTO SYSTM
ccns.description: A SOURCE FOR THE PRODUCTION OF ELECTRICITY USING PHOTOVOLTAIC PANELS.

ccns.title: STANDBY GENERATOR BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A STANDBY GENERATOR PLANT (811 60).

ccns.title: STANDBY GENERATOR PLANT
ccns.description: STANDBY GENERATORS ARE USED TO PROVIDE ELECTRICAL POWER WHEN THE NORMAL SOURCE OF POWER IS NOT AVAILABLE.

ccns.title: ELECTRIC DISTRBN BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE SHOULD BE USED FOR BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH ELECTRIC DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM THAT ARE NOT INCLUDED UNDER SWITCHING STATION/SUBSTATION BUILDINGS, CATEGORY CODE 813 10.

ccns.title: TRANSFORMERS
ccns.description: TRANSFORMERS TRANSFORM ELECTRICAL POWER ON THE PRIMARY SIDE TO A LOWER OR HIGHER VOLTAGE ON THE SECONDARY SIDE TO SERVE A FACILITY OR SEVERAL FACILITIES.

ccns.title: EXT LIGHTING, POLE MT
ccns.description: UNIFORM POLE MOUNTED ILLUMINATION AT INSTALLATIONS, INCLUDING PERIMETER AND INTERIOR LIGHTING.

ccns.title: OVERHD ELEC DIST LINES
ccns.description: THE OVERHEAD LINES ARE FOR THE TRANSMISSION OF ELECTRICAL POWER BETWEEN SOURCE, SUBSTATIONS AND SWITCHING STATIONS, AND END USERS.

ccns.title: UNDERGRD ELEC DIST LINES
ccns.description: THE UNDERGROUND LINES ARE FOR THE TRANSMISSION OF ELECTRICAL POWER BETWEEN SOURCE, SUBSTATIONS AND SWITCHING STATIONS, AND END USERS.

ccns.title: SWITCHG SUB/SUBSTA BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR THE BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A SUBSTATION OR SWITCHING STATION (813 20 OR 813 30).

ccns.title: SUBSTATIONS
ccns.description: DISTRIBUTION SUBSTATIONS, NORMALLY CONSISTING OF TRANSFORMERS AND THEIR ASSOCIATED SWITCHGEAR, STRUCTURES, BUSES, GROUNDING SYSTEMS, AND PROTECTIVE DEVICES; TRANSFORM ELECTRICAL POWER TO A LOWER OR HIGHER VOLTAGE AND PUT IT ON THE DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM.

ccns.title: SWITCHG STA/SECT DIST CIRC
ccns.description: A SWITCHING STATION IS EQUIPMENT IN AN ELECTRIC DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM WHERE ELECTRIC POWER IS SWITCHED WITHOUT TRANSFORMATION. SWITCHING STATIONS ARE LOCATED AT POINTS WHERE IT IS NECESSARY TO BRANCH OFF FROM A MAIN FEEDER OR FEEDERS WITH SMALLER COMPONENTS DUE TO PHYSICAL LOCATION OF THE FACILITIES TO BE SERVED OR TO ISOLATE PORTIONS OF FEEDERS FOR MAINTENANCE OR REPAIR.

ccns.title: LGHTNG PROT SYS
ccns.description: STANDALONE LIGHTNING PROTECTION SYSTEMS ARE THOSE THAT ARE NOT INCLUDED AS PART OF A SPECIFIC FACILITY'S INSTALLED EQUIPMENT. THESE ARE USUALLY CONSTRUCTED TO PROTECT A COMPOUND, A SINGLE BUILDING (WHERE THE SYSTEM IS CONSTRUCTED OF MASTS AND IS NOT A PART OF THE FACILITY) OR SERIES OF BUILDINGS. UM IS "EA", WHICH CONSTITUTES UP TO FOUR LIGHTNING PROTECTION MASTS/STRUCTURES. FOR SYSTEMS WITH MORE THAN FOUR, INCREASE UM QUANTITY ACCORDINGLY.

ccns.title: HEATING PLANT BUILDING
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A HEATING PLANT INCLUDING CATEGORY CODES 821 12, 821 22, OR 821 30.

ccns.title: HTG PLNT - OIL/GAS
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR A PLANT THAT UTILIZES OIL OR GAS FOR THE PRODUCTION AND DISTRIBUTION OF HEAT. THIS INCLUDES STEAM, HOT WATER, HIGH PRESSURE/LOW PRESSURE, ETC., SERVING MORE THAN ONE SEPARATE FACILITY.

ccns.title: HTG PLNT-COAL
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR A PLANT THAT UTILIZES COAL FOR THE PRODUCTION AND DISTRIBUTION OF HEAT. THIS INCLUDES STEAM, HOT WATER, HIGH PRESSURE/LOW PRESSURE, ETC., SERVING MORE THAN ONE SEPARATE FACILITY.

ccns.title: NON-FOSL FUEL HTG PLT
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR A PLANT THAT UTILIZES A NON-FOSSIL FUEL FOR THE PRODUCTION AND DISTRIBUTION OF HEAT. THIS INCLUDES STEAM, HOT WATER, HIGH PRESSURE/LOW PRESSURE, ETC., SERVING MORE THAN ONE SEPARATE FACILITY.

ccns.title: NUCLEAR STEAM PLANT-ALL
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR A PLANT THAT UTILIZES NUCLEAR FUEL FOR THE PRODUCTION AND DISTRIBUTION OF HEAT. THIS INCLUDES STEAM, HOT WATER, HIGH PRESSURE/LOW PRESSURE, ETC., SERVING MORE THAN ONE SEPARATE FACILITY.

ccns.title: NON-NUCLEAR STEAM PLANT
ccns.description: TO BE DELETED

ccns.title: DISTILATE HEATING FUEL OIL
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR FUEL OIL TANKS USED FOR HEATING BUILDINGS, GENERATION OF STEAM, POWER PLANT REQUIREMENTS, AND FOR OTHER HEAT GENERATING FACILITIES AS REQUIRED.

ccns.title: RESIDUAL HEATING OIL STG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR FUEL OIL TANKS USED FOR HEATING BUILDINGS, GENERATION OF STEAM, POWER PLANT REQUIREMENTS, AND FOR OTHER HEAT GENERATING FACILITIES AS REQUIRED. NO. 4 FUEL OIL, NO. 5 FUEL OIL AND NO. 6 FUEL OIL ARE VARIOUSLY REFERRED TO AS RESIDUAL FUEL OILS.

ccns.title: STEAM DIST SYSTEM BLDG
ccns.description: BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A HEATING DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM (CATEGORY CODES 822 12, 822 14, 822 16 OR 822 26). THE REQUIREMENT FOR STEAM AND CONDENSATE OR HOT WATER PIPELINES IS DETERMINED FROM AN ENGINEERING STUDY.

ccns.title: COND RETURN PUMP STATION
ccns.description: PUMP STATIONS ARE UTILIZED TO PUMP CONDENSED STEAM (CONDENSATE) BACK TO THE STEAM PLANT OR OTHER FACILITY.

ccns.title: STEAM LINES
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE CONTAINS ALL DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM PIPES THAT CONVEY STEAM. THE REQUIREMENT FOR STEAM AND CONDENSATE OR HOT WATER PIPELINES IS DETERMINED FROM AN ENGINEERING STUDY.

ccns.title: CONDENSATE LINE
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE CONTAINS ALL COLLECTION SYSTEM PIPES THAT CONVEY CONDENSATE. THE REQUIREMENT FOR STEAM AND CONDENSATE OR HOT WATER PIPELINES IS DETERMINED FROM AN ENGINEERING STUDY.

ccns.title: HOT WATER LINES
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE CONTAINS ALL PIPES THAT CONVEY HOT WATER LESS THAN 250 DEGREES. THE REQUIREMENT FOR STEAM AND CONDENSATE OR HOT WATER PIPELINES IS DETERMINED FROM AN ENGINEERING STUDY.

ccns.title: HIGH TEMP HOT WTR LINES
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE CONTAINS ALL PIPES THAT CONVEY HOT WATER HEATED ABOVE 250 DEGREES. THE REQUIREMENT FOR STEAM AND CONDENSATE OR HOT WATER PIPELINES IS DETERMINED FROM AN ENGINEERING STUDY.

ccns.title: GAS GENERATING BUILDING
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE CONTAINS BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A GAS GENERATING PLANT.

ccns.title: GAS GENERATING PLANT
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE CONTAINS PLANT EQUIPMENT THAT GENERATES GAS FOR USE IN THE UTILITY SYSTEM.

ccns.title: GAS METER BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE CONTAINS BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH GAS METERING.

ccns.title: GAS STORAGE TANKS
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE CONTAINS TANKS FOR THE STORAGE OF LIQUID NATURAL GAS AND/OR PROPANE CONNECTED TO A GAS DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM SERVING MULTIPLE FACILITIES.

ccns.title: GAS MAINS
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS FOR THE MAIN GAS LINES (PIPES) THAT CARRY THE BULK OF THE GAS TO AND FROM FACILITIES AT AN INSTALLATION.

ccns.title: COOLING SYS PLANT BLDG
ccns.description: BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A COOLING SYSTEM PLANT (CATEGORY CODE 826 20).

ccns.title: COOLING SYSTEM PLANT
ccns.description: A PLANT FOR THE PRODUCTION AND DISTRIBUTION OF A CHILLED FLUID FOR MORE THAN ONE SEPARATE FACILITY.

ccns.title: COOLING SYS VALVE BLDG
ccns.description: BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A COOLING DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM (CATEGORY CODE 827 20).

ccns.title: CHILLED FLUID LINES
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES ASSETS PREVIOUSLY CONTAINED IN CCN 827 25.

ccns.title: SWGE TRMT BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES THE BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH THE SEWAGE TREATMENT PLANT (CATEGORY CODE 831 10).

ccns.title: SWGE TRMT PLT
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR ALL TYPE OF SEWAGE TREATMENT PLANTS; PRIMARY, SECONDARY, OR TERTIARY.

ccns.title: BALLAST CONTAMTN SKMR
ccns.description: A FACILITY TO REMOVE GREASE, OIL, AND OTHER CONTAMINENTS FROM THE WATER REMOVED FROM SHIP BALLAST TANKS.

ccns.title: INDUSTRY WAST TREATMT BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH AN INDUSTRIAL WASTEWATER TREATMENT PLANT (CATEGORY CODE 831 15).

ccns.title: INDUSTRY WAST TREATMT FAC
ccns.description: THIS CAT CODE IS USED FOR A DEDICATED INDUSTRIAL WASTEWATER TREATMENT PLANT. ALL THE PLANT EQUIPMENT; EQUALIZATION, PRELIMINARY TREATMENT, CLARIFICATION, HOLDING TANKS, BIOLOGICAL TREATMENT, CHEMICAL TREATMENT, FILTRATION, DISINFECTION, DEWATERING, DIGESTION, SLUDGE DISPOSAL, ELECTRICAL SYSTEM, CONTROLS, COMPRESSED AIR, STORAGE, AND COMS, IS INCLUDED AS A SINGLE WASTEWATER TREATMENT PLANT.

ccns.title: OIL / WATER SEPARATOR
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR OIL/WATER SEPARATORS THAT DISCHARGE TO THE SANITARY SEWER OR INDUSTRIAL WASTE COLLECTION SYSTEM. OIL/WATER SEPARATORS BELONG TO THE FACILITY WHICH IT SERVES.

ccns.title: OUTFALL SEWER LINE
ccns.description: AN OUTFALL SANITARY SEWER LINE RECEIVES THE SEWAGE FROM A COLLECTING SYSTEM OR THE EFFLUENT FROM A SANITARY SEWAGE PLANT AND CARRIES IT TO A POINT OF FINAL DISCHARGE. PLANNING FOR OUTFALL SEWER LINES WILL INCLUDE LAND ACQUISITION.

ccns.title: SEPTIC TANK/DRAIN FIELD
ccns.description: A SEPTIC TANK AND DRAIN FIELD FACILITY PROVIDES SEWAGE TREATMENT FOR HUMAN WASTE AT ISOLATED FACILITIES WHERE AN EXTENSION OF THE CENTRAL SEWER COLLECTION SYSTEM WOULD NOT BE ECONOMICALLY FEASIBLE. A SEPTIC TANK AND DRAIN FIELD WILL INCLUDE A CONCRETE OR PROTECTED STEEL TANK, A DRAIN FIELD SYSTEM INCLUDING HEADERS, LATERALS, OPEN JOINT CLAY OR CONCRETE PIPE, GRAVEL, DITCHING, AND LAND ACQUISITION.

ccns.title: SEPTIC LAGOON &/OR POND
ccns.description: A STRUCTURE USED FOR COLLECTING AND HOLDING SEWAGE TO ALLOW FOR SETTLEMENT AND EVAPORATION. THESE STRUCTURES ARE TYPICALLY CONCRETE ENCASED.

ccns.title: RADIOACTV WASTE HANDL BLDG
ccns.description: RADIOACTIVE WASTE HANDLING BUILDING.

ccns.title: RADIOACTV WASTE HANDL FAC
ccns.description: RADIOACTIVE WASTE HANDLING FACILITY.

ccns.title: HAZARD WSTE STOR & TRANSFR
ccns.description: A STORAGE FACILITY FOR THE CONTAINMENT AND SHIPMENT OF HAZARDOUS WASTES. CAN BE SHORT TERM (HW STORAGE LESS THAN 90 DAYS) OR LONG TERM (HW STORAGE 90 DAYS OR MORE).

ccns.title: HAZARD WASTE STORAGE AREA
ccns.description: AN EXTERIOR LAYDOWN AREA FOR THE STORAGE OF HAZARDOUS WASTE MATERIALS THAT DO NOT POSE ANY THREATS TO THE ENVIRONMENT VIA CONTAMINATED RUNOFF.

ccns.title: HAZ WASTE BLDG
ccns.description: A BUILDING THAT HAS BEEN PROPERLY CERTIFIED TO STORE SUBSTANCES THAT CANNOT LEGALLY BE DISPOSED OF IN A NORMAL SANITARY LANDFILL OR INTO A REFUSE INCINERATOR DESIGNATED TO HANDLE MUNICIPAL TYPE REFUSE, OR CANNOT BE DISCHARGED INTO A SANITARY SEWERAGE SYSTEM.

ccns.title: SANITARY SEWER LINE
ccns.description: ALL DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM PIPES THAT COLLECT AND TRANSPORT SANITARY SEWAGE. TYPES INCLUDE GRAVITY OR FORCED MAIN SYSTEMS.

ccns.title: COMBINED SEWER LINE
ccns.description: ALL DISTRIBUTION PIPES THAT COLLECT AND TRANSPORT BOTH SANITARY SEWAGE AND STORM WATER.

ccns.title: SEWAGE PUMP STA BLDG
ccns.description: BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A SEWAGE PUMP STATION. THE PRIMARY UNIT OF MEASURE IS SQUARE FEET (SF).

ccns.title: SEWAGE WASTE PUMPG STA
ccns.description: A SEWAGE PUMPING STATION IS A FACILITY USED TO MOVE SEWAGE THROUGH MAINS TO A TREATMENT PLANT, TO SERVE WHERE A GRAVITY SYSTEM IS NOT FEASIBLE, AND/OR TO LIFT SEWAGE FROM ONE LEVEL TO ANOTHER IN A GRAVITY SYSTEM.

ccns.title: SEWAGE LIFT STATIONS
ccns.description: A SEWAGE LIFT STATION IS A FACILITY USED TO MOVE SEWAGE THROUGH MAINS TO A TREATMENT PLANT, TO SERVE WHERE A GRAVITY SYSTEM IS NOT FEASIBLE, AND/OR TO LIFT SEWAGE FROM ONE LEVEL TO ANOTHER IN A GRAVITY SYSTEM.

ccns.title: INDUSTRIAL WASTEWTR LN
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES ALL DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM PIPES THAT COLLECT AND TRANSPORT INDUSTRIAL WASTEWATER. TYPES INCLUDE GRAVITY OR FORCED MAIN.

ccns.title: IND WASTE WATER PUMP STAT
ccns.description: FACILITIES USED TO TRANSPORT WASTE STREAMS TO HOLDING TANKS OR INDUSTRIAL WASTE TREATMENT PLANTS, TO SERVE WHERE A GRAVITY SYSTEM IS NOT FEASIBLE, AND/OR TO LIFT WASTE STREAMS FROM ONE LEVEL TO ANOTHER IN A GRAVITY SYSTEM.

ccns.title: INCINRTR BLDG & INCINRTR
ccns.description: BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH AN INCINERATOR. AN INCINERATOR IS A FACILITY FOR BURNING COMBUSTIBLE REFUSE TO REDUCE IT TO STABLE GASES AND INERT SOLIDS.

ccns.title: INCINERATOR - EXTERIOR
ccns.description: AN INCINERATOR IS A FACILITY FOR BURNING COMBUSTIBLE REFUSE TO REDUCE IT TO STABLE GASES AND INERT SOLIDS. AN EXTERIOR INCINERATOR IS ONE THAT IS NOT ENCLOSED IN A STRUCTURE.

ccns.title: SANITARY/CUT-FIL DISP AREA
ccns.description: LANDFILLS ARE LINED (USUALLY WITH CLAY) EXCAVATIONS IN WHICH SOLID WASTES ARE BURIED, COVERED AND MONITORED. LANDFILLING SOLID WASTE IS THE TECHNOLOGY OF LAST RESORT. CONSULT EPA AND STATE REGULATIONS AND THE LATEST SOLID WASTE TEXT BOOKS FOR ENGINEERING PRINCIPLES AND PRACTICES IN SITING AND SCOPING A LANDFILL.

ccns.title: GARBAGE GRINDER BLDG
ccns.description: A GARBAGE GRINDER FACILITY THAT IS FULLY ENCLOSED BY A BUILDING.

ccns.title: GARBAGE GRINDER
ccns.description: A GARBAGE GRINDER FACILITY THAT IS PARTIALLY ENCLOSED BY AN OPEN STRUCTURE.

ccns.title: GARBAGE STAND
ccns.description: AN OPEN STRUCTURE USED TO PARTIALLY ENCLOSE TRASH RECEPTACLES, USUALLY DUMPSTERS.

ccns.title: GARBAGE/RECYCLE BUILDING
ccns.description: SMALL BUILDING USED FOR TEMPORARY STORAGE OF TRASH OR RECYCLABLES PRIOR TO REMOVAL AND PROCESSING BY A COLLECTION SERVICE.

ccns.title: WATER TREATMENT FAC BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH A WATER TREATMENT PLANT (841 10), DESALINIZATION PLANT (841 25), OR WELLS - POTABLE WATER (841 50).

ccns.title: WATER TREATMENT FACILITIES
ccns.description: A WATER TREATMENT PLANT IS A FACILITY THAT TREATS WATER TO MAKE IT SAFE FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION (POTABLE). THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES THE STRUCTURES, EQUIPMENT, AND PROCESSES REQUIRED TO TREAT POTABLE WATER. WATER TREATMENT PLANT BUILDINGS ARE CLASSIFIED AS 841 09.

ccns.title: NUCL WATER TREATMT FAC
ccns.description: NO CRITERIA FOR THIS FACILITY ARE CURRENTLY AVAILABLE.

ccns.title: WATER SUPPLY LINE
ccns.description: THE PIPE THAT CONVEYS WATER FROM SOURCE TO POINT OF TREATMENT OR TO THE POINT OF CONSUMPTION. A PRESSURE MAIN WILL BE NEEDED IF THE WATER IS PUMPED. HOWEVER, IF TOPOGRAPHY PERMITS, A GRAVITY SYSTEM IS PLANNED.

ccns.title: DESALINIZATION PLANT
ccns.description: A WATER TREATMENT PLANT THAT UTILIZES A PROCESS, SUCH AS DISTILLATION, REVERSE OSMOSIS, OR ELECTRO DIALYSIS, THAT REMOVES DISSOLVED MINERAL SALTS AND OTHER DISSOLVED SOLIDS FROM WATER.

ccns.title: ELEVTD POTABLE WATER TANK
ccns.description: WATER STORAGE TANKS FOR POTABLE WATER ARE ELEVATED OR GROUND-LEVEL STRUCTURES USED TO STORE BULK QUANTITIES OF POTABLE WATER. ELEVATED TANKS FOR POTABLE WATER PROVIDE BOTH STORAGE AND STATIC PRESSURE FOR THE DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM. GROUND-LEVEL TANKS ACCOMMODATE PEAK DEMAND REQUIREMENTS WITHOUT AFFECTING THE CAPABILITY OF THE SOURCE.

ccns.title: GRND LVL POTABL WATER TANK
ccns.description: WATER STORAGE TANKS FOR POTABLE WATER ARE ELEVATED OR GROUND-LEVEL STRUCTURES USED TO STORE BULK QUANTITIES OF POTABLE WATER. ELEVATED TANKS FOR POTABLE WATER PROVIDE BOTH STORAGE AND STATIC PRESSURE FOR THE DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM. GROUND-LEVEL TANKS ACCOMMODATE PEAK DEMAND REQUIREMENTS WITHOUT AFFECTING THE CAPABILITY OF THE SOURCE.

ccns.title: WATER WELLS - POTABLE
ccns.description: EQUIPMENT THAT PUMPS WATER FROM UNDERGROUND SOURCES TO TREATMENTS PLANTS OR DIRECTLY TO DISTRIBUTION WITH MINOR TREATMENT.

ccns.title: RESERVOIR - POTABLE WATER
ccns.description: AN OPEN BODY OF WATER FOR THE COLLECTION AND STORAGE OF WATER USED BY A WATER TREATMENT FACILITY OR WATER DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM.

ccns.title: WATER CATCHMENT STRUCTURE
ccns.description: A MAN-MADE STRUCTURE DESIGNED TO CAPTURE OR COLLECT RAINWATER AND USED TO PRODUCE POTABLE WATER.

ccns.title: WATER DISTRIBTN BLDG, PTBL
ccns.description: ALL BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH THE DISTRIBUTION OF POTABLE WATER. POTABLE WATER WILL BE TRANSMITTED FROM A STORAGE TANK OR A TREATMENT PLANT TO ALL STATION DEMAND POINTS THROUGH A PIPELINE. THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH THE DISTRIBUTION OF POTABLE WATER, TYPICALLY HOUSING DISTRIBUTION PUMPS AND EQUIPMENT.

ccns.title: WATER DISTBTN LINE, POTBL
ccns.description: ALL PIPES THAT CONVEY POTABLE WATER FROM THE TREATMENT PLANT TO THE END USER.

ccns.title: PUMP STATION - POTABLE
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE WILL INCLUDE THE PUMP(S) AND APPURTENANT PIPING, VALVES, AND OTHER MECHANICAL AND ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT FOR PUMPING WATER IN THE POTABLE WATER SYSTEM.

ccns.title: FIRE PROTECTION LINES
ccns.description: FIRE PROTECTION PIPELINES ARE USED EXCLUSIVELY IN THE TRANSMISSION OF WATER FOR FIRE PROTECTION, NOT DOMESTIC USE.

ccns.title: FIRE PROTECTION PUMPG STA
ccns.description: A FIRE PROTECTION PUMPING STATION IS A COLLECTION OF PUMPS AND SUPPORTING EQUIPMENT USED TO INCREASE THE PRESSURE IN THE FIRE PROTECTION SYSTEM.

ccns.title: FIRE PROTECTION WATER TANK
ccns.description: TANKS THAT PROVIDE FIRE PROTECTION WATER STORAGE TO ACCOMMODATE PEAK DEMAND REQUIREMENTS.

ccns.title: FIRE PROTECTION RESERVOIR
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS FOR A RESERVOIR THAT HAS A CAPACITY GREATER THAN OR EQUAL TO ONE MILLION GALLONS AND TYPICALLY PROVIDES A SUFFICIENT QUANTITY OF WATER IN RESERVE TO INSURE AN UNINTERRUPTED FLOW FOR FIRE PROTECTION.

ccns.title: FIRE PROTECTION WATER WELL
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS FOR EQUIPMENT THAT PUMPS WATER FROM UNDERGROUND SOURCES TO THE FIRE PROTECTION SYSTEM.

ccns.title: FIRE PROTECTION BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH THE DISTRIBUTION OF FIRE PROTECTION WATER, TYPICALLY HOUSING DISTRIBUTION PUMPS AND EQUIPMENT.

ccns.title: WATER DIST BLDG, NONPOTB
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES ALL BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH THE SUPPLY OR DISTRIBUTION OF NONPOTABLE WATER, TYPICALLY HOUSING DISTRIBUTION PUMPS AND EQUIPMENT.

ccns.title: WELLS - NONPOTABLE WATER
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES EQUIPMENT THAT PUMPS WATER FROM UNDERGROUND SOURCES TO A DEDICATED NONPOTABLE WATER DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM.

ccns.title: PUMP STA - NONPOTBL
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES THE COLLECTION OF PUMPS AND SUPPORTING EQUIPMENT USED TO SUPPLY WATER TO THE NONPOTABLE WATER SYSTEM

ccns.title: STORAGE TANKS- NONPOTBL WTR
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES TANKS THAT PROVIDE NONPOTABLE WATER STORAGE TO ACCOMMODATE PEAK DEMAND REQUIREMENTS.

ccns.title: RESERVOIRS- NONPOTBL WATER
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES A RESERVOIR THAT HAS A CAPACITY GREATER THAN OR EQUAL TO ONE MILLION GALLONS AND TYPICALLY PROVIDES A SUFFICIENT QUANTITY OF WATER IN RESERVE TO INSURE AN UNINTERRUPTED FLOW FOR NONPOTABLE WATER REQUIREMENTS.

ccns.title: PIPELINE- NONPOTABLE WATER
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE INCLUDES ALL PIPES THAT TRANSMIT WATER IN A DEDICATED NONPOTABLE WATER DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM.

ccns.title: ROADS
ccns.description: ROADS, STREETS, AND BRIDGES ARE GENERALLY PLANNED TO CONFORM TO THE STANDARDS AND PRACTICES OF THE AMERICAN ASSOCIATION OF STATE HIGHWAY OFFICIALS (AASHO), BUREAU OF PUBLIC ROADS (BPR), AND STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENTS.

ccns.title: ROADS, UNSURFACED
ccns.description: VEHICULAR ROADWAYS THAT DO NOT HAVE A PERMANENT/IMPERVIOUS SURFACE SUCH AS ASPHALT OR CONCRETE.

ccns.title: LOAD / UNLOAD RAMP
ccns.description: A RAMP, USUALLY CONCRETE OR STEEL/IRON THAT IS UTILIZED TO ASSIST IN THE LOADING OF TRUCKS AND RAILCARS.

ccns.title: VEHICULAR BRIDGES
ccns.description: BRIDGES ARE GENERALLY USED TO CROSS AREAS OF DIFFERING ELEVATIONS. GENERALLY THEY ARE PLANNED TO CONFORM TO THE STANDARDS AND PRACTICES OF THE AMERICAN ASSOCIATION OF STATE HIGHWAY OFFICIALS (AASHO), BUREAU OF PUBLIC ROADS (BPR), AND STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENTS.

ccns.title: VEH. PARK, UNSURFACED
ccns.description: AN AREA FOR PARKING PRIVATE AND/OR GOVERNMENT OWNED VEHICLES AND EQUIPMENT THAT DO NOT HAVE A PERMANENT/IMPERVIOUS SURFACE SUCH AS ASPHALT OR CONCRETE.

ccns.title: VEHICLE STAGING AREA
ccns.description: AN AREA, PAVED OR UNPAVED, THAT IS FOR TEMPORARY STORAGE OF VEHICLES PRIOR TO SHIPMENT OR FURTHER DEPLOYMENT.

ccns.title: TRAFFIC CONTROL SIGNALS
ccns.description: DEVICES USED FOR DIRECTING PEDESTRIAN, VEHICULAR OR RAIL TRAFFIC BY MEANS OF POWER-OPERATED CONTROLS. COSTS INCLUDE SIGNAL DEVICES, NECESSARY SUPPORTS, AND ELECTRIC POWER CABLES AND ARE COUNTED PER INTERSECTION.

ccns.title: VEHICULAR TUNNEL
ccns.description: VEHICULAR TUNNELS ARE USED FOR SLOPE STABILIZATION AND AUTOMOBILE ACCESS IN AREAS WHERE STEEP SLOPES LIMIT DEVELOPMENT AND REQUIRE INNOVATIVE ACCESS SOLUTIONS. THESE TUNNELS SERVE VEHICULAR AND PEDESTRIAN TRAFFIC AS WELL AS HOUSING UTILITY RUNS.

ccns.title: PARKING AREA
ccns.description: THE PAVED AND/OR STABILIZED AREA WITHIN AN ORGANIZATIONAL MOTOR POOL AND PARKING LOT,

ccns.title: BICYCLE SHELTER
ccns.description: A STRUCTURE USED FOR TEMPORARY PARKING OF BICYCLES.

ccns.title: SIDEWALK
ccns.description: A PATHWAY CONSTRUCTED TO SUPPORT PEDESTRIAN TRAFFIC. CONSTRUCTION IS OF CONCRETE, ASPHALT, PAVING BLOCKS, GRAVEL, OR THE LIKE.

ccns.title: PEDESTRIAN BRIDGES
ccns.description: BRIDGES THAT SUPPORT WALKWAY CROSSING OF A RIVER, UNDERPASS, OR SIMILAR GAP.

ccns.title: OTHER PAVED AREA
ccns.description: THIS CODE IS FOR MISCELLANEOUS VEHICULAR PAVEMENTS NOT CAPTURED IN OTHER 100 OR 400 SERIES CATEGORY CODES.

ccns.title: MISC OPEN STRG/LAYDOWN
ccns.description: THIS CODE IS FOR OPEN STORAGE AREAS OTHER THAN THOSE USED FOR GENERAL SUPPLY OPERATIONS (CATEGORY CODE 451 10). IT INCLUDES PUBLIC WORKS OPEN STORAGE FACILITIES.

ccns.title: BLDG/TRLR PAD W/ UTIL CNCT
ccns.description: PAVED SURFACE CONSTRUCTED TO SUPPORT A TEMPORARY FACILITY OR TRAILER. UTILITY CONNECTIONS ARE PART OF THE TRAILER PAD REQUIREMENTS AND ALLOW TEMPORARY FACILITIES (OFTEN CLASS 3 PROPERTY) TO BE EASILY INSTALLED.

ccns.title: PARKING BLDG
ccns.description: A STRUCTURE OR BUILDING DESIGNED FOR PARKING PRIVATE AND/OR GOVERNMENT OWNED VEHICLES AND EQUIPMENT IN INDIVIDUAL PARKING SPOTS/LOCATIONS. THE FACILITY MAY BE ABOVE GROUND OR UNDERGROUND. THE PARKING BUILDING SHOULD BE JUSTIFIED BY LAND RESTRICTIONS AND ECONOMIC CONSIDERATIONS.

ccns.title: RAILROAD TRACKAGE
ccns.description: RAIL TRACK TO INCLUDE SPURS, SIDINGS, YARDS, AND TURNOUTS. TRACK INCLUDES TWO PARALLEL RAILS, CROSSTIES, AND ROADBED.

ccns.title: EXPLOSV BARICD,TRUCK/CAR
ccns.description: A CONCRETE AND EARTHEN STRUCTURE PLACED ALONGSIDE A SUSPECT CARGO SITE FOR TRUCKS AND RAILCARS CONTAINING AMMUNITION OR EXPLOSIVES THAT ARE SUSPECTED OF BEING IN A HAZARDOUS CONDITION.

ccns.title: RR BRIDGE&TRESTLE
ccns.description: BRIDGES THAT SUPPORT RAILROAD TRACK CROSSING OF A RIVER, ROAD UNDERPASS, OR SIMILAR GAP.

ccns.title: CRANE TRACKAGE
ccns.description: TRACKAGE USED IN OPERATIONAL AREAS TO ALLOW CRANE TRAVEL BETWEEN OPERATIONAL FACILITIES OR WATERFRONT AREAS SUCH AS PIERS AND WHARVES.

ccns.title: RAILROAD SCALEHOUSE
ccns.description: A RAILROAD SCALEHOUSE IS A FACILITY DESIGNED TO WEIGH RAIL CARGO. TYPICALLY, TRACKS ARE LAID TO ALLOW RAILCARS TO BE PULLED THROUGH THE SCALEHOUSE.

ccns.title: STORM SEWER
ccns.description: STORM SEWERS ARE COMPONENTS OF A STORM DRAINAGE SYSTEM THAT COLLECTS THE SURFACE RUNOFF WATER AND CONVEYS IT TO OUTLET POINTS.

ccns.title: OIL/WATER SEPARATOR-RUNOFF
ccns.description: OIL/WATER SEPARATOR USED FOR SEPARATING PETROLEUM CONTAMINANTS FROM STORMWATER PRIOR TO BEING REINTRODUCED INTO THE NATURAL ENVIRONMENT.

ccns.title: STORM WATER PUMPING STA
ccns.description: PUMP STATION FACILITY USED FOR MOVING STORMWATER RUNOFF FROM ONE ELEVATION/LOCATION TO ANOTHER.

ccns.title: STORM WATER POND
ccns.description: A STORM WATER RETENTION POND IS UTILIZED TO CONTAIN AND CONTROL STORM WATER RUNOFF AT A PREDETERMINED RATE.

ccns.title: DRAIN DITCH,EXC ROAD DITCH
ccns.description: DRAINAGE DITCHES SERVE THE SAME PURPOSE AS STORM SEWERS. THEY ARE PREFERABLE TO COVERED STRUCTURES TO MINIMIZE CONSTRUCTION, TO CONSERVE MATERIALS, AND TO FACILITATE MAINTENANCE.

ccns.title: DYKE / DAM
ccns.description: A DAM IS AN ARTIFICIAL OR NATURAL BARRIER USUALLY CONSTRUCTED ACROSS A STREAM CHANNEL TO IMPOUND WATER.

ccns.title: LEVEE &/OR DIKE
ccns.description: A LEVEE IS A TYPE OF DAM THAT RUNS ALONG THE BANKS OF A RIVER OR CANAL. LEVEES REINFORCE THE BANKS AND HELP PREVENT FLOODING.

ccns.title: IRRIGATION FACILITY
ccns.description: THESE FACILITIES ARE USED TO SUPPLY WATER TO AREAS THAT NEED WATER ABOVE THE AMOUNT OF NATURAL RAINFALL. THEY CAN CONSIST OF A SERIES OF PUMPS, PIPES AND OTHER ASSOCIATED EQUIPMENT.

ccns.title: RETAINING WALL
ccns.description: A STRUCTURE CONSTRUCTED TO RESTRICT OR PREVENT THE HORIZONTAL MOVEMENT OF EARTH.

ccns.title: DREDGED SPOIL HNDLG FAC
ccns.description: FACILITY FOR STORAGE OF DREDGE SPOILS PRIOR TO PROCESSING AND REMOVAL.

ccns.title: SECURTY/PERIMTR FENCE/WALL
ccns.description: SECURITY FENCING AND WALLS DEFINE THE LIMITS OF SECURITY AREAS AND FACILITATE THE EFFECTIVE AND ECONOMICAL USE OF SECURITY PERSONNEL. FENCING IS PLANNED ON THE BASIS OF A STUDY OF THE SECURITY CLASSIFICATION REQUIREMENTS OF THE INSTALLATION.

ccns.title: HARDENED SEC FENCE
ccns.description: A LINEAR STRUCTURE INTENDED TO RESTRICT ACCESS TO A SPECIFIC AREA OR TO RESTRICT AND DIRECT THE FLOW OF TRAFFIC. THESE STRUCTURES INCLUDE HARDENING OR SPECIAL CHARACTERISTIC BEYOND STANDARD FENCES AND WALLS SUCH AS INTRUSION DETECTION, RAZOR WIRE, OR BARRIER IMPACT/PENETRATION RESISTANCE MEASURES.

ccns.title: INTERIOR FENCE*EXC 87210*
ccns.description: MISCELLANEOUS FENCING INTERIOR TO AN INSTALLATION PERIMETER FENCE. THIS CATEGORY CODE IS FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY.

ccns.title: GUARD AND WATCH TOWERS
ccns.description: WHERE AUTHORIZED, GUARD OR WATCHTOWERS SHOULD BE CONSTRUCTED AT LOCATIONS THAT WILL PROVIDE THE BEST OBSERVATION OF SECURITY AREAS.

ccns.title: MECH SEC BARRICADE
ccns.description: MECHANICALLY OPERATED BARRICADE CONSISTING OF POP-UP BOLLARDS, RISING ROAD PLATES, OR WEDGES DESIGNED TO CONTROL VEHICLULAR OR OTHER TRAFFIC. UNIT OF MEASURE IS EA AND INCLUDES DEVICES USED FOR A SINGLE TRAFFIC LANE.

ccns.title: ENTRY GATE
ccns.description: ENTRY GATE; PORTION OF STATION SECURITY/PERIMETER FENCE WALL DEDICATED TO PEDESTRIAN AND VEHICLE INGRESS/EGRESS. CCN ADDED JANUARY 2024 (POST 2019-06-27 APPENDIX A EXTRACTION). ADDED TO LOCAL VOCABULARY FROM USER-SUPPLIED CLB-4 SPEC 2026-04-30; PENDING FC 2-000-05N APPENDIX A REFRESH.
ccns._provenance_note: not_in_2019_appendix_a_extraction; added 2026-04-30 from methodology-owner spec; verify against current FC 2-000-05N Appendix A on next refresh

ccns.title: FIRE ALARM COMM LINES
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED TO CAPTURE THE FIRE ALARM REPORTING SYSTEM RELATED COMMUNICATION LINES THAT ARE EXTERIOR TO THE BUILDINGS THEY SERVE. FACILITY FIRE ALARM EQUIPMENT AND RELATED BUILDING INFRASTRUCTURE ARE EITHER RPIE OR PPE AND ARE NOT INCLUDED IN THIS CATEGORY CODE.

ccns.title: WATCH RPTG SYSTEM LINES
ccns.description: A WATCH REPORTING SYSTEM PROVIDES A METHOD FOR THE AUTOMATIC AND NON-AUTOMATIC DETECTION OF FIRE AND FOR SECURITY PROTECTION (INTRUSION DETECTION SYSTEM) THROUGHOUT DESIGNATED AREAS, BUILDINGS, AND STRUCTURES. THE WATCH REPORTING SYSTEM PROVIDES LOCAL ALARMS AND CENTRAL STATION ALARMS TO BUILDING OCCUPANTS AND TO STATION SECURITY AND FIREFIGHTING PERSONNEL.

ccns.title: BASE ALERT SYSTEMS LINES
ccns.description: BASE ALERT SYSTEMS SHALL BE PLANNED FOR ALL NAVY INSTALLATIONS. THE SYSTEM MAY ALERT BASE PERSONNEL TO AIR RAIDS, CHEMICAL/BIOLOGICAL ATTACKS OR ANY OTHER TYPE OF TERRORIST ATTACK. HORNS OF HIGH-POWER TYPE MAY BE USED AS SIGNAL DEVICES.

ccns.title: AIR CRASH/ALERT COMM LINES
ccns.description: ALARM SYSTEM INTENDED TO ALERT IN THE EVENT OF AN AIR CRASH

ccns.title: MISC UTILITY BLDG
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR BUILDINGS ASSOCIATED WITH PUBLIC WORKS UTILITIES SHOPS AND OTHER MISCELLANEOUS UTILITY BUILDINGS. IF A UTILITY BUILDING CANNOT BE CLASSIFIED UNDER ONE OF THE OTHER UTILITY TYPE BUILDINGS, THIS CATEGORY CODE SHOULD BE USED.

ccns.title: ACETYLENE DISTRBTN SYSTEM
ccns.description: THE DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM FOR ACETYLENE GAS GENERATED BY THE ACETYLENE PLANT IN CCN 89010.

ccns.title: NITROGEN PLANT
ccns.description: NITROGEN IS USED WHERE AN INERT GAS IS REQUIRED. A NITROGEN PLANT IS REQUIRED FOR THE PROVISION OF LARGE QUANTITIES OF NITROGEN FOR SPECIAL APPLICATIONS.

ccns.title: UTILITY VAULT
ccns.description: A UTILITY VAULT IS AN ENCLOSED STRUCTURE GENERALLY MADE OF CONCRETE THAT CONTAINS UTILITY EQUIPMENT, CONNECTIONS AND/OR LINES. A UTILITY VAULT IS TYPICALLY AN UNDERGROUND STRUCTURE.

ccns.title: COMPRESSED AIR PLANT
ccns.description: COMPRESSED AIR IS USED BY THE NAVY IN NUMEROUS APPLICATIONS, SUCH AS FOR PNEUMATIC TOOLS, LAUNDRY EQUIPMENT, INSTRUMENTATION AND CONTROL EQUIPMENT, AND IN HOSPITALS AND LABORATORIES.

ccns.title: COMPD AIR DISTRBTN SYSTEM
ccns.description: COMPRESSED AIR IS USED BY THE NAVY IN NUMEROUS APPLICATIONS, SUCH AS FOR PNEUMATIC TOOLS, LAUNDRY EQUIPMENT, INSTRUMENTATION AND CONTROL EQUIPMENT, AND IN HOSPITALS AND LABORATORIES.

ccns.title: CARBON DIOXIDE PLANT
ccns.description: A CARBON DIOXIDE PLANT AT A NAVAL ACTIVITY PROVIDES SPACE FOR THE STORAGE AND TRANSFER OF CARBON DIOXIDE. THE SPACE CONTAINS A STORAGE TANK AND A DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM USED FOR REFILLING CARBON DIOXIDE FIRE EXTINGUISHERS.

ccns.title: ICE-MAKING PLANT
ccns.description: FACILITY FOR THE CREATION AND DISTRIBUTION OF ICE.

ccns.title: INDUSTRIAL OXYGEN PLANT
ccns.description: FACILITY USED TO GENERATE OXYGEN (NON-BREATHABLE) FOR INDUSTRIAL USE WHERE IT IS OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE.

ccns.title: OXYGEN DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM
ccns.description: PUMPS, PIPES AND LINES ASSOCIATED WITH THE DISTRIBUTION OF INDUSTRIAL OXYGEN PRODUCED BY THE INDUSTRIAL OXYGEN PLANT IN CCN 89030.

ccns.title: VALVE HSE,OTHER ENCLOSURE
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR ANY ENCLOSURE USED FOR HOUSING VALVES OR OTHER UTILITY EQUIPMENT THAT IS NOT CONTAINED IN ANY OTHER CCN.

ccns.title: UTILITY TUNNEL
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR A TUNNEL IN WHICH UTILITY SYSTEMS ARE ROUTED. THERE MAY BE MULTIPLE UTILITY SYSTEMS IN A SINGLE TUNNEL NETWORK.

ccns.title: ICS COMM LINES
ccns.description: This CCN applies to the communication links portion of an Industrial Control System (ICS). An ICS manages and moves data to provide real-time operational capability, real time consumption, demand management, energy reduction and maintenance savings opportunities, and increases the reliability and efficiency associated with building and utility systems at shore installations.

ccns.title: ICS MON STA
ccns.description: AN ICS MONITORING STATION IS USED TO MONITOR AND CONTROL MECHANICAL SYSTEMS OF FACILITIES AT REMOTE LOCATIONS.

ccns.title: WEIGHTING FACILITY
ccns.description: VEHICULAR SCALES TYPICALLY USED FOR WEIGHING TRANSPORT TRUCKS AND CONTAINERS AT AN INSTALLATION.

ccns.title: UTILITY SYSTEM STRG(MISC)
ccns.description: THIS CATEGORY CODE IS USED FOR INVENTORY PURPOSES ONLY. USE CATEGORY CODE 890 09 FOR MISCELLANEOUS UTILITY BUILDINGS.

ccns.title: MONITORING WELLS
ccns.description: WELLS INSTALLED AROUND A SITE IN ORDER TO DETECT THE DISCHARGE OF ANY LEACHATE. SAMPLES FROM THE WELLS SHOULD BE ANALYZED PRIOR TO THE DISPOSAL OF ANY WASTE IN ORDER TO ESTABLISH BASELINE DATA.

ccns.title: UTILITY CHANNEL
ccns.description: A UTILITY CHANNEL IS AN ENCLOSED UNDERGROUND CHANNEL FOR UTILITY, COMMUNICATION OR OTHER LINES THAT BOTH PROTECTS THE LINES, AND PROVIDES RELATIVELY EASY ACCESS FOR THEIR MAINTENANCE.

ccns.title: LAND - PURCHASE
ccns.description: LAND ACQUIRED IN FEE BY PURCHASE IS A NEGOTIATED SALE OF THE PROPERTY FROM PRIVATE OWNERS TO THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT BY CONVEYANCE OF DEED.

ccns.title: LAND - DONATION
ccns.description: LAND ACQUIRED IN FEE BY DONATION USUALLY CONSISTS OF A CONVEYANCE OF FEE TITLE BY THE DONOR WITHOUT MONETARY CONSIDERATION.

ccns.title: LAND - TRANSFER
ccns.description: TRANSFERS OF FEDERAL GOVERNMENT- OWNED LAND AMONG DEPARTMENTS AND AGENCIES OF THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT

ccns.title: LAND - CONDEMNATION
ccns.description: LAND IS ACQUIRED BY CONDEMNATION WHERE LAND IS ESSENTIAL FOR A PROJECT WHICH AFFECTS NATIONAL DEFENSE OR SECURITY, AND THE CONSIDERATION FOR PURCHASE CANNOT BE MUTUALLY AGREED UPON BETWEEN THE OWNER AND THE NAVY.

ccns.title: LAND - EXCHANGE
ccns.description: LAND ACQUIRED BY EXCHANGE IS SIMILAR IN PRINCIPLE TO ACQUISITIONS BY PURCHASE EXCEPT THAT THE CONSIDERATION IS BY LAND VALUE RATHER THAN CASH.

ccns.title: LAND - PUB DOMAIN,PERM
ccns.description: FEDERAL GOVERNMENT LAND PERMANENTLY EXCLUDED FROM SOME OR ALL FORMS OF ENTRY, USE, SALE, OR OTHER DISPOSAL UNDER THE PUBLIC LANDS LAWS AS SPECIFIED IN THE PUBLIC LAND ORDER, EXECUTIVE ORDER, OR ACT OF CONGRESS AND THOSE LANDS THAT ARE RESERVED FOR A SPECIFIED DEPARTMENT OR AGENCY FOR A SPECIFIC PUBLIC PURPOSE.

ccns.title: LAND - SET ASIDE- HAWAII
ccns.description: FEDERAL GOVERNMENT LAND RESERVED THROUGH LAND TRUST IN STATE OF HAWAII

ccns.title: LAND-PUB DOMAIN,TEMPORY
ccns.description: FEDERAL GOVERNMENT LAND EXCLUDED FROM SOME OR ALL FORMS OF ENTRY, USE, SALE, OR OTHER DISPOSAL UNDER THE PUBLIC LANDS LAWS AS SPECIFIED IN THE PUBLIC LAND ORDER, EXECUTIVE ORDER, OR ACT OF CONGRESS AND THOSE LANDS THAT ARE RESERVED FOR A SPECIFIC PUBLIC PURPOSE FOR A SPECIFIED PERIOD OF TIME.

ccns.title: LAND-TEMP USE,LIC,PMT,AGMT
ccns.description: THIS LAND IS ACQUIRED FOR TEMPORARY USE UNDER LICENSE OR PERMIT. THE LICENSE OR PERMIT IS A PRIVILEGE, REVOCABLE AT WILL, TO USE THE PROPERTY OF THE LICENSER, FOR A SPECIFIED PURPOSE AND PERIOD OF TIME.

ccns.title: LAND-PUB DOMAIN -TEMP/PMT
ccns.description: LAND FROM PUBLIC DOMAIN USED UNDER TEMPORARY PERMIT IS OBTAINED UNDER AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE NAVY DEPARTMENT, AND THE DEPARTMENT OF THE INTERIOR. THE TEMPORARY PERMIT IMPLIES NO USE DETRIMENTAL TO THE LAND SUCH AS CONTAMINATION.

ccns.title: LAND-PUBLIC- TEMPO/LNG TERM
ccns.description: THIS CODE IS USED FOR PUBLIC LAND OF U.S. POSSESSIONS ACQUIRED AND USED UNDER LONG-TERM AGREEMENTS OR TEMPORARY AGREEMENTS.

ccns.title: LAND-PUBLIC-TEMP PERMIT
ccns.description: THIS CODE IS USED TO DESIGNATE PUBLIC LAND OF U.S. POSSESSIONS ASSIGNED TO THE NAVY ON TEMPORARY PERMIT.

ccns.title: LND-AVTN EASEMENT- PURCHASE
ccns.description: AN AVIATION EASEMENT IS PURCHASED TO CONVEY CERTAIN PROPERTY RIGHTS FROM THE PRIVATE OWNER TO THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT. THIS IS DONE BY CONVEYANCE OF DEED. EASEMENTS ARE ACQUIRED TO INSURE FREE AND UNOBSTRUCTED AIRCRAFT PASSAGE THROUGH THE AIRSPACE. THE EASEMENT PROVIDES THE RIGHT TO LIMIT STRUCTURE HEIGHT AND NATURAL GROWTH.

ccns.title: LND-AVTN EASEMT- CONDEMN
ccns.description: THIS CODE VARIES FROM 921 10 ONLY IN THE METHOD OF ACQUISITION. POSSESSION IS OBTAINED BY CONDEMNATION ONLY WHEN THE PURCHASE PRICE CANNOT BE MUTUALLY AGREED UPON BETWEEN THE OWNER AND THE NAVY.

ccns.title: LAND-OTH EASEMENT- PURCHASE
ccns.description: EASEMENTS OTHER THAN FOR NAVIGATION ARE ACQUIRED BY NEGOTIATED SALE. THESE EASEMENTS PROVIDE RIGHTS-OF-WAY FOR TYPICAL UTILITY LINES AND ACCESS ROADS AS WELL AS MANY OTHER PURPOSES, INCLUDING RESTRICTIONS ON USE.

ccns.title: LAND-OTH EASEMENT- CONDEMNA
ccns.description: THIS IS SIMILAR TO 921 30 BUT DIFFERS IN THAT AGREEMENT ON A NEGOTIATED EASEMENT CANNOT BE REACHED, AND THE EASEMENT IS OBTAINED BY CONDEMNATION FOR REASON OF NATIONAL DEFENSE OR SECURITY.

ccns.title: LAND-OTH EASEMENT- EXCHANGE
ccns.description: THIS IS SIMILAR TO 92130 BUT DIFFERS IN THAT CONSIDERATION IS LAND VALUE RATHER THAN CASH.

ccns.title: LAND-IN-LEASE- PRIV ENTERPR
ccns.description: THIS LAND IS LEASED FROM PRIVATE OWNERS FOR PERIODS UNDER 25 YEARS.

ccns.title: LAND- IN-LEASE- STAT&LOC
ccns.description: THIS LAND IS LEASED FROM STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENTS FOR PERIODS UNDER 25 YEARS.

ccns.title: LAND-IN LEASE- LONG TERM
ccns.description: LAND IN-LEASE FOR 25 YEARS OR MORE IS CATEGORIZED AS "LONG-TERM". THE LAND MAY BE LEASED FROM PRIVATE ENTERPRISE, OR STATE OR LOCAL GOVERNMENTS.

ccns.title: LAND-FOREIGN 99 YR LEASE
ccns.description: LAND - FOREIGN, 99-YEAR LEASE

ccns.title: LAND-FOREIGN, BASE RIGHTS
ccns.description: LAND - FOREIGN, BASE RIGHTS

ccns.title: LAND-FOREIGN RECIP AID
ccns.description: LAND - FOREIGN, RECIPROCAL AID

ccns.title: LAND - FOREIGN, OCC AREA
ccns.description: LAND - FOREIGN, OCCUPIED AREA

ccns.title: LAND-FOREIGN, IN-LEASE
ccns.description: LAND - FOREIGN, IN-LEASE

ccns.title: LAND- FOREIGN,MISC
ccns.description: LAND - FOREIGN, MISCELLANEOUS
